title_zh: 你好！很高兴认识你
goals: 能听懂并说出常见的问候语（Hello / Hi / Good morning / Goodbye）
能用 am / is / are 造简单的句子（I am…, You are…, She is…）
能正确念出五个元音字母 a/e/i/o/u 的名字与短音
能区分并发出 /θ/（think）和 /s/（sing）两个不同的音

grammarNote.point_en: The verb 'to be' (am / is / are) and greetings Hello / Goodbye
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 英语里 be 动词有三个形式：I 用 am；he / she / it 用 is；you / we / they 用 are。它的意思接近中文的"是"，但英语句子里几乎不能省略。缩写很常用：I am = I'm，you are = you're，she is = she's。问候语 Hello / Hi 用于见面，Goodbye / Bye 用于道别，Good morning / afternoon / evening 按时间选择。

examples.en: I am Anna.
examples.zh: 我是安娜。

examples.en: She is my friend.
examples.zh: 她是我的朋友。

examples.en: You are late.
examples.zh: 你迟到了。

examples.en: We are students.
examples.zh: 我们是学生。

examples.en: Hello! Good morning.
examples.zh: 你好！早上好。

examples.en: Goodbye! See you tomorrow.
examples.zh: 再见！明天见。

vocabulary.meaning_zh: 怎样（How are you? 你好吗？）

listening.title: First Day at School (第一天上学)
listening.script:
A: Hello! Good morning. My name is Anna. I am a new student.
B: Hi, Anna! Nice to meet you. I am Ben. I am a student too.
A: Nice to meet you, Ben. How are you today?
B: I am fine, thank you. And you?
A: I am very good, thank you. Is she your friend?
B: Yes, she is. Her name is Sara. She is my friend.
A: Hello, Sara! Nice to meet you.
C: Hi, Anna! Nice to meet you too. Are you a new student?
A: Yes, I am. This is my first day.
C: Welcome! We are happy to meet you.
B: Look, the teacher is here. Good morning, teacher!
A: Good morning! I am sorry, I am a little late.
D: No problem, Anna. Come in, please. Sit down.
A: Thank you very much.
B: Anna, we are friends now. Have a good day!
A: Thank you, Ben. You are very nice. Goodbye for now!

targetSounds: 元音字母名字：a /eɪ/, e /iː/, i /aɪ/, o /oʊ/, u /juː/ —— 念"字母名"时和短音不同，先把这五个字母名读准
元音短音：a /æ/ (cat), e /e/ (bed), i /ɪ/ (sit), o /ɑː/ (hot), u /ʌ/ (cup) —— 嘴型从大到小、放松
/θ/（think, thank）：舌尖轻放在上下牙之间，送气，不出声；不要读成中文的 s 或 z
/s/（sing, sorry）：舌尖靠近上齿龈但不伸出，气流从缝隙出来；和 /θ/ 对比：sink 与 think

speaking.speakingTask: 录一段 30 秒的自我介绍：先说 Hello，再说 My name is ___，然后说 I am a student / I am from ___，最后用 Nice to meet you! 结尾。尽量用上 am / is / are。

reading.title: Anna Says Hello (安娜打招呼)
reading.passage:
Hello! My name is Anna. I am a student. Today is my first day at school. I am a little late, and I am sorry.

At school, I meet Ben. "Hi! Nice to meet you," I say. Ben is nice. He is a student too. He is my new friend.

Sara is here too. She is Ben's friend. "Hello, Sara! How are you?" I ask. "I am fine, thank you," she says.

Our teacher is here now. "Good morning!" she says. "Good morning, teacher," we say. We are happy students.

The letter A is my first letter, because my name is Anna. A, E, I, O, U — these are the vowel sounds. I like English. English is a good language.

At the end of the day, we say goodbye. "Bye, Ben! Bye, Sara! See you again," I say. "Have a good day, Anna!" they say. Today is a good day.

comprehension.q: Who is the story about?
comprehension.a: It is about a student named Anna.

comprehension.q: Is it Anna's first day at school?
comprehension.a: Yes, it is her first day.

comprehension.q: Who are Anna's new friends?
comprehension.a: Ben and Sara are her new friends.

comprehension.q: What are the five vowel letters in the story?
comprehension.a: A, E, I, O, U.

comprehension.q: How is the day for Anna?
comprehension.a: It is a good day.

writing.prompt: 写 4-6 个短句介绍你自己和一次打招呼。用上 Hello / Hi、My name is…、I am…、Nice to meet you 和 Goodbye。
writing.modelAnswer: Hello! My name is Wei. I am a student. This is my first day of English. How are you? I am fine, thank you. English is a good language. I have a new friend. Her name is Anna. She is nice. Nice to meet you! Goodbye! Have a good day.
selfCheck: 每个句子里都有 am / is / are 吗？
I 后面用了 am，he/she/it 后面用了 is，you/we/they 后面用了 are 吗？
句子开头字母大写、结尾有句号吗？
用到了至少两个问候语（如 Hello 和 Goodbye）吗？
名字（如 Anna、Wei）的首字母大写了吗？

reviewFocus: 今天是第一天，暂无往日内容需复习。请重点巩固本课核心：(1) 大声复述 am / is / are 的搭配（I am / she is / you are），(2) 反复对比朗读 /θ/ 与 /s/ 的最小对立词：think–sink, thank–sank, thing–sing, mouth–mouse，(3) 把五个元音字母名 a-e-i-o-u 连读三遍。这些词汇（hello, name, friend, teacher, student, thank, fine, good, day）会在第 2 天"自我介绍"中再次出现，请提前熟记。
dailyTip_zh: 第一天最重要的是"开口"，不是"完美"。每句 shadowing 至少跟读 5 遍，先模仿语音语调，再看意思。把 Hello / Nice to meet you 这样的句子练到不用想就能说出来，它们是你未来 29 天每天都用得到的"高频句"。

title_en: Nice to Meet You: Name, Country, and Job
title_zh: 很高兴认识你：姓名、国家和工作
goals: 能用完整的句子介绍自己的姓名、来自哪个国家、以及做什么工作（例如 I am Li Wei. I am from China. I am a teacher.）
能正确使用主格代词 (I, you, he, she, it, we, they) 搭配 be 动词 (am/is/are)
能用 my / your 说出"我的名字"和"你的名字"，并礼貌地询问对方信息
能清晰发出 /w/ 和 /r/ 两个音，并读准英文名字的重音位置

grammarNote.point_en: Subject pronouns + to be (am/is/are); My / Your
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 英语句子通常需要一个主语（谁）。主格代词代替名字：I（我）、you（你/你们）、he（他）、she（她）、it（它）、we（我们）、they（他们）。每个代词要搭配对应的 be 动词：I am / you are / he is / she is / it is / we are / they are。口语中常用缩写：I'm, you're, he's, she's, it's, we're, they're。介绍自己最常用 I am ... 说姓名、国家、工作。My 表示"我的"，your 表示"你的"，后面直接加名词，如 my name（我的名字）、your job（你的工作）。注意：说工作时，单数要加 a/an，如 I am a teacher（我是一名老师）、She is an engineer（她是一名工程师，engineer 以元音开头用 an）。

examples.en: I am Anna. I am from Canada.
examples.zh: 我是安娜。我来自加拿大。

examples.en: He is a doctor. She is a nurse.
examples.zh: 他是医生。她是护士。

examples.en: My name is Wang Li. What is your name?
examples.zh: 我的名字是王丽。你叫什么名字？

examples.en: We are students. They are teachers.
examples.zh: 我们是学生。他们是老师。

examples.en: You are from Japan, and I am from China.
examples.zh: 你来自日本，我来自中国。

listening.title: At a New English Class (在新的英语课上)
listening.script:
A: Hello, everyone! Welcome to our English class. My name is Rita. I am your teacher. I am from the United States. Now, please tell me your name.
B: Hi, Rita. My name is Wang Lei. I am from China. I am a student here.
A: Nice to meet you, Wang Lei. What is your job?
B: I work in a hospital. I am a nurse.
A: Oh, great! A nurse is a very good job. And who is she?
B: She is my friend. Her name is Mei. She is a doctor.
A: Welcome, Mei. Nice to meet you too. Are you from China too?
C: Yes, I am. I am from China. We are friends. We work together.
A: Wonderful! You are all welcome here. Now, let us start. Please open your books. Today we learn to say our name, our country, and our job. It is easy and fun!

targetSounds: /w/：嘴唇要收圆并向前突出，像小声吹口哨的口型，然后快速放开。练习 we, work, welcome, what。注意 your 里的 y 是 /j/ 音，别和 w 混淆。
/r/：舌尖上卷但不碰到上颚，嘴唇稍微收圆，舌头是"悬空"的。练习 Rita, from, friend, great, work, nurse。注意不要发成中文的"日"或卷舌的"儿"。
英文名字的重音 (word stress in names)：多音节名字通常重读第一个音节，如 RI-ta、AN-na、DA-vid、SA-ra；中文拼音名字重音在前，如 WANG Lei、LI Wei。重读的音节读得更长、更响、更清楚。

shadowing.text: Where are you from?
shadowing.tip: Where 的 /w/ 圆唇；are you 轻读，重音落在 from。

shadowing.text: I am from China.

shadowing.text: What is your job?
shadowing.tip: What 用 /w/ 圆唇起音；口语常说 "What's your job?"。

shadowing.text: I work in a hospital.
shadowing.tip: work /wɜːrk/ 同时练 /w/ 和 /r/；work in 连读成 "wor-kin"。

shadowing.text: We are friends. We work together.
shadowing.tip: friends 和 work 都有 /r/；together 重音在中间 to-GE-ther。

shadowing.text: Welcome to our class.
shadowing.tip: Welcome 重读第一音节 WEL-come，/w/ 圆唇。

shadowing.text: Nice to meet you too.
shadowing.tip: too /tuː/ 元音拉长；整句语调先降后在 too 上稍稳住。

speaking.speakingTask: 请录一段 30 到 45 秒的自我介绍：说出你的名字、你来自哪个国家、你的工作或身份。试着用上 My name is ... , I am from ... , I am a/an ... 三个句型，最后加一句 Nice to meet you.

reading.title: Meet Three New Friends (认识三位新朋友)
reading.passage:
Hello! My name is Anna. I am from Canada. I am a teacher. I work in a big school. I love my job.

This is my friend Ken. He is from Japan. He is a doctor. He works in a hospital. He is very kind.

And this is Mei. She is from China. She is a student now, but she wants to be an engineer. She is smart and friendly.

We are good friends. We are from three countries: Canada, Japan, and China. Our jobs are different, but we are happy together. We study English every day.

What is your name? Where are you from? What is your job? Please tell us. We want to meet you too!

comprehension.a: She is from Canada. (她来自加拿大。)

comprehension.q: What is Ken's job?
comprehension.a: He is a doctor. (他是一名医生。)

comprehension.q: What does Mei want to be?
comprehension.a: She wants to be an engineer. (她想成为一名工程师。)

comprehension.q: How many countries are the three friends from?
comprehension.a: Three countries: Canada, Japan, and China. (三个国家：加拿大、日本和中国。)

comprehension.q: What do the friends do every day?
comprehension.a: They study English every day. (他们每天学英语。)

writing.prompt: 写一段 40 到 80 词的英文自我介绍。介绍你的名字、你来自哪个国家、你的工作或身份，再介绍一位你的朋友（他/她的名字、国家、工作）。
writing.modelAnswer: Hello! My name is Chen Hua. I am from China. I am a worker. I work in a big factory. This is my friend Li Ming. He is from China too. He is a teacher. He works in a school. We are good friends. We study English together every day. Nice to meet you!
selfCheck: 每个句子是否都有主语（I, he, she, we ...）和正确的 be 动词（am/is/are）？
说工作时，单数名词前是否记得加 a 或 an（元音开头用 an，如 an engineer）？
"我的"用了 my，"你的"用了 your 吗？名字和国家（China, Japan）的首字母是否大写？
句子开头是否大写、句末是否有句号？
有没有自然地用上今天的高频词，如 name, from, job, friend？

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 1 的内容：(1) be 动词 am/is/are 的基本用法，今天扩展到与全部主格代词搭配；(2) 问候语 Hello / Hi / Goodbye，今天在对话开头继续使用；(3) Day 1 的发音重点——元音 a/e/i/o/u 和 /θ/ 音，请在读 thank you (/θ/)、name、meet、from 时留意。练习方法：先用 Day 1 学的 Hello/Hi 打招呼，再立刻接上今天的 My name is... I am from... 连成一段，做到旧词新句、边学边用。
dailyTip_zh: 大声朗读 + 影子跟读是口语进步最快的方法。今天请把听力对话至少跟读三遍：第一遍看文本读，第二遍盖住中文读，第三遍闭上眼睛只听音频同步跟读（shadowing）。每天坚持录一段自我介绍并回听，你会清楚听到自己的进步。记住：说错不要紧，多开口才是关键！

title_zh: 现在几点了？数字、时间和日期
goals: 能从 0 数到 100，并清楚区分 thirteen/thirty 这类 -teen 和 -ty 的重音
会用 What time is it? It's ... 问答时间（整点、半点、一刻钟）
能正确使用时间和日期介词 at（几点）和 on（星期几/日期）
能说出星期几、月份和简单的日期（如 the third of July）

grammarNote.point_en: Telling the time (What time is it? It's ...) and prepositions at / on
grammarNote.explanation_zh:
问时间用 What time is it?（现在几点？），回答用 It's + 时间。整点：It's seven o'clock（七点整）。半点：It's half past seven（七点半，past 表示“过了”）。一刻：It's a quarter past seven（七点过一刻）/ It's a quarter to eight（差一刻八点，to 表示“差、到”）。也可以直接读数字：It's seven thirty。

介词 at 用于具体的钟点时间：at seven o'clock、at noon、at night。介词 on 用于星期几和日期：on Monday、on July the third。口诀：at + 点钟，on + 星期/日期。

发音重点：-teen 结尾（13–19）重音在后：thir-TEEN；-ty 结尾（30、40…）重音在前：THIR-ty。这个重音差别决定别人听懂的是 13 还是 30，一定要练。

examples.en: What time is it? It's nine o'clock.
examples.zh: 现在几点？九点整。

examples.en: The class starts at half past eight.
examples.zh: 课在八点半开始。

examples.en: My birthday is on Monday.
examples.zh: 我的生日在星期一。

examples.en: We have a meeting on July the third.
examples.zh: 我们七月三号有个会。

examples.en: It's a quarter to six, so I go home now.
examples.zh: 差一刻六点，所以我现在回家。

I have a class in the afternoon.
We eat dinner in the evening.
There are seven days in a week.
I go to work on Monday.

listening.title: What time is it?
listening.script:
A: Good morning, Mia! What time is it now?
B: Good morning, Tom. It's eight o'clock.
A: Eight o'clock? Oh, no! My class starts at half past eight.
B: Don't worry. You have thirty minutes.
A: Is it Monday today?
B: No, it's Tuesday. It's the third of July.
A: The third of July? That's my sister's birthday!
B: Really? How old is she?
A: She is thirteen today. Not thirty, thirteen!
B: Thirteen, nice. Is her party on Tuesday?
A: No, the party is on Saturday. It starts at six o'clock in the evening.
B: Great. What time is it now again?
A: It's a quarter past eight. I must go!
B: OK. Have a good day. See you at noon!
A: See you. Goodbye!

comprehension.a: It's eight o'clock.

comprehension.a: It's Tuesday, the third of July.

comprehension.a: She is thirteen.

comprehension.q: When does the party start?
comprehension.a: At six o'clock in the evening, on Saturday.

comprehension.q: What time is it at the end?
comprehension.a: It's a quarter past eight.

targetSounds: /θ/ in three, thirteen, thirty, third, month — 舌尖轻放在上下齿之间，轻轻送气，不要读成 /s/ 或 /f/
-teen 重音在后 (thir-TEEN, four-TEEN)；-ty 重音在前 (THIR-ty, FOR-ty) — 用重音区分 13 和 30
o'clock 里的弱读 /ə/：读作 uh-KLOCK，第一个音很轻

reading.title: A Busy Tuesday
reading.passage:
Hello! My name is Anna. I am from Spain, and I am a teacher. Today is Tuesday, the third of July. I am very busy today!

In the morning, I get up at seven o'clock. My first class starts at eight o'clock. I have three classes in the morning. At noon, I eat lunch with my friend Sam. He is from Japan.

In the afternoon, I have two more classes. They start at half past one. I finish work at a quarter to five.

In the evening, I go home. My family eats dinner at seven o'clock. It is my father's birthday today. He is thirty! We have a small party at night. What a busy, happy day!

comprehension.a: It is her father's birthday; he is thirty.

comprehension.a: It is the third of July, a Tuesday.

title_en: My Family and People I Know
title_zh: 我的家人和我认识的人
goals: 能说出家庭成员的名称，并介绍自己的家人（有几个人、叫什么）
能用 have got / has got 说明拥有的关系或东西（I have got a brother.）
能用所有格 's 表示归属（my father's name, Anna's sister）
能听懂并复述关于家庭的简短对话，并正确区分 /v/ 和 /f/ 两个音

grammarNote.point_en: have got / has got and possessive 's
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 1) 表示“拥有/有关系”时，用 have got（I/you/we/they）和 has got（he/she/it）。口语中常缩写：I've got, She's got。否定：I haven't got, He hasn't got。疑问：Have you got...? Has she got...? 2) 所有格 's 表示“某人的”：在人名或名词后加 's，如 my mother's name（我妈妈的名字）、Tom's car（Tom的车）。注意：he's 可能是 he is 或 he has got 的缩写，要看句子判断。

listening.title: Anna's Family Photo
listening.script:
A: Hi, Anna! Is this a photo of your family?
B: Yes, it is. This is my family. We are five people.
A: Wow, you have got a big family! Who is this tall man?
B: That is my father. His name is David. He is a teacher.
A: And this woman?
B: That is my mother, Vera. She is very kind.
A: Have you got any brothers or sisters?
B: Yes, I have got one brother and one sister. This is my brother, Ben. He is young.
A: He is very tall!
B: Yes, he is! And this is my sister's baby. My sister has got a little son.
A: Oh, a baby! What is his name?
B: His name is Felix. He is my favorite person in the family.
A: Your family is lovely, Anna.
B: Thank you very much!

/f/ 无声唇齿音：口型和 /v/ 相同，但声带不振动、只出气。对比：fan/van, fine/vine, leaf/leave
schwa /ə/ 弱音：非重读音节里最轻最短的“额”音，几乎一带而过。如 father /ˈfɑːðə/, mother 的 -er，parents 的 -ents

reading.title: Ben's Family
reading.passage:
Hello! My name is Ben. I have got a big family. We are six people. My father's name is David. He is tall and he works in a school. My mother's name is Vera. She is very kind, and she makes good food.

I have got one brother and one sister. My brother is young. His name is Felix. My sister's name is Anna. She has got a baby now! The baby is her son. He is very small.

We also live with my grandmother. She is old, but she is happy. My grandmother's tea is my favorite. On Sunday, all the family eat together. I love my family very much.

comprehension.a: His name is David, and he works in a school. (他叫 David，在学校工作。)

comprehension.a: Ben's sister, Anna. The baby is her son. (Ben 的姐姐 Anna，宝宝是她儿子。)

comprehension.a: His grandmother's tea. (他奶奶泡的茶。)

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 1-3：用 Day 1 的 to be（is/are）和问候语开启家庭介绍（Hello! This is...）；用 Day 2 的 My/Your 和 name/country/job 说家人的名字与职业（My father's name is..., My mother is a nurse from China）；用 Day 3 的数字说家里有几口人、家人的年龄（We are five people; My grandfather is eighty）。今天的对话与短文已自然循环这些内容，请边读边留意。
dailyTip_zh: 今天重点在“听”和“说”。把 Anna's Family Photo 的音频连续听 3 遍：第 1 遍不看文字只抓大意，第 2 遍跟着看文字，第 3 遍暂停做影子跟读。特别注意 /v/ 和 /f/ 的区别（very–ferry, five–life），对着镜子看自己的牙齿和嘴唇位置。每天开口至少 15 分钟，录音后回听，进步会很快。

title_zh: 我的日常作息
goals: 能用一般现在时描述自己每天的日常活动 (I get up at seven / She works in a shop)
能正确使用频率副词 always/usually/often/sometimes/never，并放在正确的位置
能听懂并说出一段关于每日作息的短对话，回答 What time...? 的问题
能正确读出动词第三人称单数 -s/-es 的三种发音 /s/、/z/、/ɪz/

grammarNote.point_en: Present simple + adverbs of frequency
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 一般现在时用来表示每天/经常发生的习惯性动作。主语是 I / you / we / they 时，动词用原形 (I get up, they work)；主语是第三人称单数 he / she / it 时，动词要加 -s 或 -es (he gets up, she watches TV)。否定和疑问用 do / does：I don't get up early. / Does she work? 频率副词 always(总是) / usually(通常) / often(经常) / sometimes(有时) / never(从不) 表示动作发生的频率，通常放在实义动词的前面 (I always get up early)，但放在 be 动词的后面 (She is never late)。

examples.en: I usually get up at six thirty.
examples.zh: 我通常六点半起床。

examples.en: She always drinks coffee in the morning.
examples.zh: 她早上总是喝咖啡。

examples.en: My brother works in a shop. He often works late.
examples.zh: 我哥哥在一家商店工作。他经常工作到很晚。

examples.en: We don't watch TV in the morning.
examples.zh: 我们早上不看电视。

examples.en: Does your father cook dinner? — Yes, sometimes.
examples.zh: 你爸爸做晚饭吗？——是的，有时候做。

examples.en: He is never late for work.
examples.zh: 他上班从不迟到。

listening.title: A Normal Day / 平常的一天
listening.script:
A: Hi Ben! What time do you get up on work days?
B: I usually get up at six thirty. I'm never late for work.
A: Wow, that's early! What do you do first?
B: First I wash my face and brush my teeth. Then I have breakfast.
A: What do you eat?
B: I always eat eggs and bread. And I drink coffee. My sister drinks tea.
A: When do you leave home?
B: I leave home at seven forty. I catch the bus to work. My work starts at half past eight.
A: And your sister? Does she work too?
B: Yes, she works in a shop. She often finishes late, at seven in the evening.
A: What do you do after work?
B: I usually cook dinner. Sometimes I watch TV. I never go to bed late. I always go to bed at eleven.
A: You have a good routine, Ben!

targetSounds: /s/ 结尾（清辅音后）：像 works, starts, eats — 直接发轻轻的 /s/ 音
/z/ 结尾（元音或浊辅音后）：像 lives, reads, plays 发 /z/，声带要振动
/ɪz/ 结尾（发 s/z/sh/ch/x 音的词后）：像 washes, brushes, catches, finishes — 多读一个音节 '呃兹'

shadowing.tip: usually 读作 /ˈjuːʒuəli/，注意中间的 /ʒ/ 音，像'usual'。

shadowing.tip: drinks 结尾是 /ks/，coffee 重音在前，读 /ˈkɔːfi/。

shadowing.tip: washes 和 brushes 都加 /ɪz/，多一个音节：wash-es, brush-es。

shadowing.tip: works 结尾清辅音 /k/ 后发 /s/：/wɜːrks/。

shadowing.tip: finishes 以 /ʃ/ 音结尾，所以加 /ɪz/：fin-ish-es。

shadowing.text: He catches the bus every day.
shadowing.tip: catches 以 /tʃ/ 结尾，加 /ɪz/：catch-es；the bus 连读。

shadowing.text: I never go to bed late.
shadowing.tip: never 里的 /e/ 短促，late 的 /eɪ/ 是双元音，滑动要清楚。

shadowing.text: We often eat rice in the evening.
shadowing.tip: often 的 t 常不发音 /ˈɔːfən/；in the 轻读连读。

shadowing.text: What time do you get up?
shadowing.tip: 疑问句用降调；do you 弱读连成 /djə/。

shadowing.text: She reads a book and plays with her cat.
shadowing.tip: reads /z/、plays /z/ 都是浊音，声带振动，不要发成 /s/。

reading.title: Anna's Busy Day / 安娜忙碌的一天
reading.passage:
Anna is a nurse. She has a busy routine. She always wakes up early, at half past five. First she washes her face and brushes her teeth. Then she has a small breakfast. She usually eats bread and drinks tea. She never drinks coffee.

Anna leaves home at six thirty. She catches the bus to the hospital. Her work starts at seven. She helps many people every day. She often works late.

Anna has a brother. His name is Tom. Tom works in a shop. He starts work at nine, so he gets up later than Anna. In the evening, Anna and Tom sometimes cook dinner together. Anna is always tired at night. She goes to bed at ten. She never goes to bed late on work days. Anna loves her routine.

comprehension.q: What time does Anna wake up?
comprehension.a: She wakes up at half past five (5:30).

comprehension.q: What does Anna eat and drink for breakfast?
comprehension.a: She eats bread and drinks tea. She never drinks coffee.

comprehension.q: Where does Anna work, and where does her brother Tom work?
comprehension.a: Anna works in a hospital, and Tom works in a shop.

comprehension.q: Does Anna go to bed late on work days?
comprehension.a: No, she never goes to bed late. She goes to bed at ten.

usefulPhrases: I have breakfast at ... and I leave home at ...
writing.modelAnswer: My routine is simple. I usually get up at seven o'clock. First I wash my face and brush my teeth. Then I have breakfast. I always eat eggs and drink tea. I leave home at eight and I go to work. My work starts at nine. In the evening, I sometimes cook dinner and watch TV. I never go to bed late. I always go to bed at eleven.
selfCheck: 我是否在 he/she/it 后面给动词加了 -s 或 -es？(例如 She gets up, He washes)
频率副词是否放对位置？(实义动词前面，be 动词后面)

每个句子是否都有主语和动词？

reviewFocus: 复习前几天内容并融入今天的句子：Day 3 的时间与介词 (What time...? / at seven / half past eight / on work days) 在听力和阅读中反复出现，请再读出 5 个不同时间。Day 4 的 have/has got 与家庭成员 (brother, sister, mother, father) 结合今天的作息复述，例如 "My sister works in a shop. She has got a busy routine."。Day 2 的自我介绍 (name, job) 用在阅读 Anna is a nurse / Tom works in a shop。Day 1 的 to be (am/is/are) 与今天的一般现在时对比：I am tired (be) vs. I get up early (实义动词)。
dailyTip_zh: 今天的重点是"听"和"说"。请把听力对话至少听 3 遍：第一遍只听大意，第二遍做填空听写，第三遍跟读影子练习 (shadowing)——耳朵听到一句，你就立刻小声跟着说，尽量模仿语音语调。第三人称 -s/-es 的三种发音 (/s/、/z/、/ɪz/) 是中国学生的常见难点，别只用眼睛看规则，要大声读出 works /s/、reads /z/、washes /ɪz/，用耳朵去记住区别。坚持每天开口，一个月后你会惊讶于自己的进步！

title_zh: 食物、饮料与点餐
goals: 能说出常见食物和饮料的名字,并区分可数与不可数名词(如 an apple / some water)
能在餐厅或咖啡店用 "I would like ..." 和 "Can I have ...?" 点餐
能用 some / any 询问和回答有没有某种食物或饮料
能正确区分并发出 /iː/(eat)和 /ɪ/(it)两个元音

grammarNote.point_en: Countable vs uncountable nouns; some / any; I would like ...
grammarNote.explanation_zh:
英语名词分两类。可数名词可以数数,有单数和复数:one apple, two apples;单数前常用 a/an(an apple)。不可数名词不能直接数,没有复数形式:water, rice, milk, tea, coffee,前面不加 a/an,也不加 -s。

some 和 any 表示"一些":肯定句用 some(I want some water. / I have some apples.);否定句和一般疑问句常用 any(I don't have any milk. / Do you have any tea?)。但在礼貌地请求或邀请时,疑问句也用 some(Would you like some coffee?)。

点餐时最礼貌的说法是 "I would like ...",可缩写成 "I'd like ...",比 "I want" 更客气。例如:I'd like a coffee, please. / I'd like some rice.

examples.en: I'd like a sandwich and some water, please.
examples.zh: 我想要一个三明治和一些水,谢谢。

examples.en: We don't have any coffee, but we have some tea.
examples.zh: 我们没有咖啡,但我们有一些茶。

examples.en: Do you have any apples? — Yes, we have some.
examples.zh: 你们有苹果吗?——有,我们有一些。

examples.en: She would like an egg for breakfast.
examples.zh: 她早餐想要一个鸡蛋。

vocabulary.example_en: Would you like a cold drink?
Can I have some water, please?
My mother drinks tea every morning.
I would like a coffee, please.
Do you want milk in your tea?
I eat bread and eggs for breakfast.
An apple a day is good.
I would like some hot soup.
Can I have a chicken sandwich?
vocabulary.example_zh: 可以给我一个鸡肉三明治吗?

vocabulary.example_en: She is thirsty. She wants water.
What do you eat for lunch?

listening.title: At the Coffee Shop（在咖啡店）
listening.script:
A: Good morning! Welcome. Here is the menu.
B: Thank you. I am very hungry this morning.
A: Are you ready to order?
B: Yes. I would like a sandwich and a coffee, please.
A: We have a chicken sandwich. Is that okay?
B: Yes, that is great. Do you have any milk for the coffee?
A: Yes, we have some milk. Do you want sugar too?
B: No sugar, thank you. But can I have some water?
A: Of course. A big glass of water. And are you thirsty? We have tea and juice too.
B: No, thank you. Water is fine.
A: Okay. One chicken sandwich, one coffee with milk, and some water.
B: Yes, that is right. How much is it?
A: It is five dollars.
B: Here you are. Thank you very much.
A: Thank you! Enjoy your food. It is very delicious.

dictation.sentence: Here is the ____.
I would like a sandwich and a ____, please.
Do you have any ____ for the coffee?
But can I have some ____?
And are you ____? We have tea and juice too.
Enjoy your food. It is very ____.

comprehension.q: What food does the customer order?
comprehension.a: A chicken sandwich.

comprehension.q: Does the customer want sugar in the coffee?
comprehension.a: No, no sugar.

comprehension.q: What does the customer drink with the meal?
comprehension.a: Water (and a coffee with milk).

comprehension.q: How much is the food?
comprehension.a: Five dollars.

targetSounds: /iː/ 长元音,像"eat, tea, meat, please":嘴角向两边拉开,发音长而清晰,类似中文"衣"拖长。
/ɪ/ 短元音,像"it, fish, milk, drink":嘴放松,声音短促,不要拖长。
对比练习:eat /iːt/ vs it /ɪt/,注意长短差别;sheep /ʃiːp/ vs ship /ʃɪp/。

shadowing.text: I am hungry. I would like some food.
shadowing.tip: hungry 中的 /ʌ/ 短促;would like 连读成 /wʊd laɪk/。

shadowing.text: Can I have a coffee, please?
shadowing.tip: Can I 连读成 /kə.naɪ/;please 用长音 /iː/。

shadowing.text: I eat rice and fish for dinner.
shadowing.tip: eat /iːt/ 长音,fish /fɪʃ/ 短音,注意长短对比。

shadowing.text: Do you have any milk?
shadowing.tip: Do you 弱读成 /djə/;milk 里 /ɪ/ 要短。

shadowing.text: Yes, we have some tea.
shadowing.tip: some /səm/ 弱读;tea 用清楚的长音 /iː/。

shadowing.text: The soup is very delicious.
shadowing.tip: delicious 重音在第二音节 /dɪˈlɪʃəs/。

shadowing.text: She is thirsty. She wants some water.
shadowing.tip: thirsty 开头 /θ/ 舌尖轻触上齿;water 中的 t 可读得轻。

shadowing.text: I would like two eggs and some bread.
shadowing.tip: two eggs 连读;bread /bred/ 是短元音 /e/。

shadowing.text: This tea is sweet, and it is hot.
shadowing.tip: sweet /iː/ 长,it /ɪ/ 短,注意区别。

shadowing.text: Thank you very much. It is delicious.
shadowing.tip: Thank 里 /θ/ 送气;句尾语调下降表示肯定。

speaking.speakingTask: Imagine you are in a restaurant. Record yourself ordering a meal. Say what you would like to eat and drink, and use "I would like ...", "some / any", and "please". For example: "I am hungry. I would like some rice and a fish. Can I have some water, please?"

reading.title: My Favorite Food（我最喜欢的食物）
reading.passage:
My name is Lin. I am from China, and I love food! Every morning I have breakfast at home. I eat some bread and one egg, and I drink tea with milk. I do not drink coffee, because it is not sweet.

At lunch time, I am always very hungry. I usually eat rice and fish, or rice and meat. I like fruit too. I eat an apple every day.

My mother makes very delicious soup. It is hot and sweet. On Sunday, my family and I go to a small restaurant near my home. The waiter is very nice. I always order fish and rice, and my father orders a big sandwich. We drink water and juice.

After dinner, I am not hungry, but I am a little thirsty. So I drink some more water. I love my food, and I love my family!

comprehension.q: What does Lin eat for breakfast?
comprehension.a: Some bread, one egg, and tea with milk.

comprehension.q: Why does Lin not drink coffee?
comprehension.a: Because it is not sweet.

comprehension.q: What does Lin order at the restaurant?
comprehension.a: Fish and rice.

comprehension.q: How does Lin feel after dinner?
comprehension.a: Not hungry, but a little thirsty, so she drinks some water.

writing.prompt: Write about the food and drink you have in one day (breakfast, lunch, and dinner). Use "I eat ...", "I drink ...", "some / any", and "I would like ...". Write about 5 to 7 sentences.
usefulPhrases: I drink some tea / coffee / water.
I like ... , but I do not like ...
I would like some ... for dinner.
writing.modelAnswer: For breakfast, I eat some bread and one egg. I drink tea with milk, but no coffee. At lunch, I am usually very hungry, so I have rice and fish. I like fruit too, and I eat an apple every day. For dinner, I would like some soup and a little rice. My favorite food is my mother's soup. It is very delicious!
selfCheck: 我用到了可数名词(a/an, 复数)和不可数名词(不加 a/an)吗?
我正确使用了 some 和 any 吗?(肯定句 some,否定/疑问句常用 any)
我用到了 "I would like ..." 来表达礼貌的想要吗?
每个句子都有主语和动词吗?(如 I eat, I drink, I am)
我复习并用上了前几天学的词吗?(如 my, mother, every day)

reviewFocus: 复习第 5 天的一般现在时和频率副词(always, usually, every day),把它们用在描述饮食习惯的句子里,如 "I usually eat rice." "I drink tea every morning."。复习第 4 天的 have got / 所有格('s)和家庭词汇(mother, father, family),在阅读中已自然出现,如 "My mother makes soup."。复习第 3 天的数字与 "How much is it?" 用于点餐付款。复习第 1-2 天的 to be(I am hungry / She is thirsty)和 my/your。
dailyTip_zh: 点餐是最实用的英语场景之一,今天请一定"开口说"。对着镜子或手机,把 mini dialogue 的两个角色都演一遍,再用 speakingTask 录下自己点餐的声音,听回放,重点检查 /iː/(eat)和 /ɪ/(it)的长短区别。学语言不是"看懂",而是"说出",每天大声重复 shadowing 句子,你的嘴巴会越来越自然。

title_zh: 我的家和房间
goals: 能用 there is / there are 说出家里每个房间有什么东西
能用 in / on / under / next to / behind 描述物品的位置
能说出至少 15 个家和房间的常用单词
能进行一段关于'家里有几个房间、有什么家具'的简单对话

grammarNote.point_en: there is / there are + prepositions of place (in, on, under, next to, behind, between)
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 1) 表示'某处有某物'用 there is / there are。单数或不可数用 there is（缩写 there's），复数用 there are。例：There is a bed. / There are two chairs. 2) 否定：There isn't a TV. / There aren't any books. 3) 疑问：Is there a table? Yes, there is. / Are there any windows? Yes, there are. 注意：这里的 there 不是'那里'的意思，只是句型的一部分。4) 位置介词放在名词后面：in（在里面）, on（在上面）, under（在下面）, next to（在旁边）, behind（在后面）, between（在两者之间）。例：The cat is under the table. The lamp is next to the bed.

examples.en: There is a big sofa in the living room.
examples.zh: 客厅里有一张大沙发。

examples.en: There are three windows in my bedroom.
examples.zh: 我的卧室里有三扇窗户。

examples.en: Is there a bathroom upstairs? Yes, there is.
examples.zh: 楼上有卫生间吗？有的。

examples.en: The keys are on the table, next to the lamp.
examples.zh: 钥匙在桌子上，台灯旁边。

examples.en: There aren't any chairs in the kitchen.
examples.zh: 厨房里没有椅子。

The milk is in the kitchen.
The book is on the table.
The shoes are under the bed.
The chair is next to the door.
The garden is behind the house.
The lamp is between the two beds.
My room is clean and nice.

listening.title: Anna Shows Her New Home
listening.script:
A: Hello, Ben! Welcome to my new home. Come in, please.
B: Thank you, Anna. Wow, it is very nice and clean! How many rooms are there?
A: There are five rooms. Look, this is the living room.
B: It is big! There is a big sofa and a TV. And there is a picture on the wall.
A: Yes. The kitchen is next to the living room. There is a table and four chairs in the kitchen.
B: Nice. Are there any bedrooms?
A: Yes, there are two bedrooms. They are upstairs. There is a bathroom upstairs too.
B: Where is the cat? Is it in the living room?
A: No, the cat is under my bed. It sleeps there every day.
B: Ha ha! Your home is really lovely.
A: Thank you! Please sit on the sofa. Would you like some tea?
B: Yes, please. Thank you, Anna.

dictation.sentence: There ____ five rooms.
There is a big ____ and a TV.
There is a picture on the ____.
They are ____.
The cat is ____ my bed.
Please sit ____ the sofa.

comprehension.q: How many rooms are there in Anna's home?
comprehension.a: There are five rooms.

comprehension.q: What is on the wall in the living room?
comprehension.a: There is a picture on the wall.

comprehension.q: Where are the two bedrooms?
comprehension.a: They are upstairs.

comprehension.q: Where is the cat?
comprehension.a: The cat is under Anna's bed.

comprehension.q: What does Ben want to drink?
comprehension.a: He wants some tea.

targetSounds: /ð/ 浊齿擦音：舌尖轻放在上下齿之间，声带振动发音，如 there, they, the, this, that。注意不要发成 /d/（否则 there 变成 dare）
linking there_is：'there is' 连读时把 there 结尾和 is 连在一起，听起来像 'therez'（/ðerz/），说 there's 时更自然
/ʌ/ 短元音：under, up 里的短促 'a' 音，嘴巴放松微开

shadowing.text: There is a bed in my bedroom.
shadowing.tip: there is 连读成 'therez'；bed 的 /d/ 要轻。

shadowing.text: There are two chairs in the kitchen.
shadowing.tip: there are 连成 'therer'；chairs 结尾 /z/ 有声。

shadowing.text: The book is on the table.
shadowing.tip: 两个 the 都发 /ð/，舌头在齿间。

shadowing.text: This is my clean room.
shadowing.tip: this 的 /ð/ 要浊，不要发成 'dis'。

shadowing.text: The cat is under the sofa.
shadowing.tip: under 的 /ʌ/ 要短，the sofa 连读顺一点。

shadowing.text: There's a lamp next to the bed.
shadowing.tip: there's 说成 'therez'，一口气带过。

shadowing.text: The bathroom is upstairs.
shadowing.tip: bathroom 里 /θ/ 清音，upstairs 重音在 stairs。

shadowing.text: They are in the living room.
shadowing.tip: they 的 /ð/ 浊音；in the 连读。

shadowing.text: Is there a window here?
shadowing.tip: is there 连读 'iz-there'，句尾升调。

shadowing.text: The keys are between the two lamps.
shadowing.tip: between 重音在 tween；the /ð/ 记得浊音。

speaking.speakingTask: Describe your own home. Say how many rooms there are, and use 'there is / there are' with in, on, under, or next to. For example: 'There are three rooms in my home. There is a sofa in the living room. My bag is under the table.' Record yourself for one minute.

reading.title: Tom's Small House
reading.passage: Tom lives in a small house. It is not big, but it is clean and nice. There are four rooms in his house. Downstairs, there is a living room and a kitchen. In the living room, there is a sofa, a TV, and a small table. There is a picture on the wall, next to the window. The kitchen is next to the living room. There are two chairs and a table in the kitchen. Upstairs, there is one bedroom and one bathroom. In the bedroom, there is a bed and a lamp. The lamp is on the table, next to the bed. Tom's books are under the bed. Every day Tom cleans his house. He loves his home very much. "My house is small," he says, "but it is my happy home."

glossary.meaning_zh: 爱（love 的第三人称单数）

comprehension.q: How many rooms are there in Tom's house?
comprehension.a: There are four rooms.

comprehension.q: What is downstairs?
comprehension.a: There is a living room and a kitchen.

comprehension.q: Where is the picture?
comprehension.a: It is on the wall, next to the window.

comprehension.q: Where are Tom's books?
comprehension.a: They are under the bed.

comprehension.q: Does Tom like his home?
comprehension.a: Yes, he loves his home very much.

writing.prompt: Write about your home. How many rooms are there? What is in each room? Use 'there is / there are' and prepositions of place (in, on, under, next to, behind). Write 40-70 words.
usefulPhrases: There are ... rooms in my home.
In the living room, there is ...
writing.modelAnswer: There are three rooms in my home. In the living room, there is a sofa and a TV. There is a picture on the wall. The kitchen is next to the living room. There are two chairs and a table in the kitchen. In my bedroom, there is a bed and a lamp. My books are under the bed. My home is small, but I love it.
selfCheck: 单数用了 there is，复数用了 there are 吗？
位置介词（in/on/under/next to）用对了吗？
每个句子结尾有句号吗？
有没有用到至少 3 个今天学的房间/家具单词？

reviewFocus: 复习第 6 天的 some/any 和 I would like（听力对话结尾 "Would you like some tea? Yes, please." 就用到了它们，请跟读并造 2 个新句子，例如 "There is some milk in the kitchen." / "Are there any chairs?"）。同时复习第 4 天的 have/has got 和第 2 天的 my/your：试着说 "I have got a big bedroom." "Your kitchen is clean." 再快速回顾第 3 天的数字 1-10，用来数房间和家具（three rooms, four chairs）。今天把 there is/there are 和这些旧知识连起来用。
dailyTip_zh: 把 there is / there are 变成"随手说"的习惯：现在就抬头看看你身边的房间，用英语小声说出你看到的 5 样东西，比如 "There is a cup on the table." "There are two windows." 学语言最有效的方法是把新句型立刻用在真实环境里——你的房间就是最好的免费教材。每天花 5 分钟"描述你的家"，一周后这个句型就会脱口而出。

title_en: Week 1 Review: Putting It All Together
title_zh: 第一周复习:把学过的内容串起来
goals: 能用完整句子做自我介绍(名字、国家、工作、家庭)
能说出时间、日期和数字,并谈论每天的日常routine
能点餐、谈论食物,并用 there is / there are 描述房间
能把第1-7天的语法和发音自然地混合运用在真实对话里

grammarNote.point_en: Mixed review of Week 1 grammar (Days 1-7)
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 今天不学新语法,而是把第一周的七个语法点串起来复习。重点回顾:(1) be动词 am/is/are;(2) 主语人称代词 + my/your;(3) 时间表达 What time is it? It's...; 介词 on/at;(4) have/has got 和所有格 's;(5) 一般现在时 + 频率副词 always/usually/sometimes;(6) 可数/不可数 some/any 和 I would like;(7) there is / there are + 地点介词。把这些点组合起来,你就能说出真实完整的对话。

examples.en: I am Li Wei. I am from China, and I am a teacher.
examples.zh: 我是李伟。我来自中国,我是一名老师。(be动词 + 自我介绍)

examples.en: It's seven o'clock, and I always have breakfast at seven.
examples.zh: 现在七点了,我总是七点吃早饭。(时间 + 频率副词 + 一般现在时)

examples.en: I've got a sister. Her name is Anna.
examples.zh: 我有一个姐姐。她叫安娜。(have got + 所有格)

examples.en: There are some apples on the table, but there isn't any milk.
examples.zh: 桌子上有一些苹果,但是没有牛奶。(there is/are + some/any)

examples.en: Would you like some tea? Yes, please.
examples.zh: 你想要点茶吗?好的,谢谢。(I would like / Would you like)

vocabulary.example_en: Let's review the words from this week.
vocabulary.example_zh: 我们来复习这周的单词。

vocabulary.example_en: I usually get up at six.
There is a table in the kitchen.
The food is on the table.
I work in a small shop.

listening.title: A Morning at Home (在家的一个早晨)
listening.script:
A: Good morning, Anna! What time is it?
B: Good morning, Tom. It's seven o'clock.
A: Seven o'clock? I usually get up at six, but today I am tired.
B: Me too. Breakfast is on the table. There are some eggs and there is some bread.
A: Great. Is there any tea?
B: Yes, there is. But there isn't any coffee. Sorry.
A: That's OK. I would like some tea, please. Where is our sister?
B: She is in the kitchen. She always drinks water in the morning.
A: Our family is so busy! What day is it today?
B: It's Monday. You work at nine, and I start at ten.
A: Right. Nice. Let's eat breakfast together now.
B: Good idea. Here is your tea, Tom.
A: Thank you, Anna. You are very kind.

dictation.sentence: Good morning, Tom. It's ____ o'clock.
I usually get up at ____, but today I am tired.
There are some eggs and there ____ some bread.
But there ____ any coffee. Sorry.
She always drinks ____ in the morning.
You ____ at nine, and I start at ten.

comprehension.q: What time is it in the dialogue?
comprehension.a: It's seven o'clock.

comprehension.q: Is there any coffee?
comprehension.a: No, there isn't any coffee. There is tea.

comprehension.q: Where is their sister?
comprehension.a: She is in the kitchen.

comprehension.q: What day is it today?
comprehension.a: It's Monday.

comprehension.q: What does the sister always drink in the morning?

targetSounds: /θ/ vs /s/: 对比 three /θriː/ 和 see /siː/,舌尖轻放齿间发 th 音

speaking.speakingTask: 录一段30-45秒的自我介绍,把第一周内容串起来:说出你的名字、来自哪个国家、你的工作、你的家人(用 have got),再说一句你每天早上通常几点做什么(用时间 + 频率副词)。例如:"My name is... I am from... I have got... I usually..."

reading.title: My Family and My Day (我的家人和我的一天)
reading.passage:
Hello! My name is Mei. I am from China, and I am a nurse. I have got a big family. I have got one sister and one brother. My sister's name is Lin, and my brother's name is Kai.

Every day I get up at six o'clock. I usually have breakfast at seven. There are some eggs and there is some bread on the table. I always drink tea in the morning. I don't drink coffee.

My home is not big, but it is nice. There is a small kitchen and there are two bedrooms. My family and I eat dinner together at seven o'clock.

On Monday I work, but on Sunday I stay at home. Sunday is my favorite day. What about you? What time do you get up? Have you got a big family too?

comprehension.q: What is Mei's job?
comprehension.a: She is a nurse.

comprehension.q: How many brothers and sisters has she got?
comprehension.a: She has got one sister and one brother.

comprehension.q: What does she always drink in the morning?
comprehension.a: She always drinks tea. She doesn't drink coffee.

comprehension.q: How many bedrooms are there in her home?
comprehension.a: There are two bedrooms.

comprehension.q: What is her favorite day?
comprehension.a: Sunday is her favorite day.

writing.prompt: 写一段短文(50-70词)介绍你自己和你的一天。把第一周学的内容串起来:名字、国家、工作、家人(have got)、每天几点起床和吃早饭(时间+频率副词),以及你家里有什么(there is / there are)。
usefulPhrases: My name is ... and I am from ...
I am a ... / I work in ...
I have got a ... . His/Her name is ...
I usually get up at ... o'clock.
There is a ... and there are some ... in my home.

I usually have breakfast at seven. I always drink tea. In my home there is a kitchen and there are two bedrooms. My family and I eat dinner together.
selfCheck: 我用对了 am/is/are 吗?(I am, she is, they are)
时间和频率副词用对了吗?(at seven o'clock; usually/always)
have got 和所有格用对了吗?(I have got..., her name is...)
there is 用于单数、there are 用于复数,对吗?
句子开头大写、句尾有句号/问号了吗?

reviewFocus: 今天是第一周总复习,重点回收前七天的核心内容:Day 1 问候语与 be 动词(Hello/Good morning, am/is/are)、Day 2 自我介绍与 my/your、Day 3 时间与 What time is it? It's...、Day 4 家人与 have got + 's、Day 5 日常与频率副词 always/usually/sometimes、Day 6 食物与 some/any + would like、Day 7 房间与 there is/there are。发音方面回顾本周所有难点:/θ/-/s/、/v/-/f/、/w/-/r/、/iː/-/ɪ/、schwa /ə/、/ð/ 连读。建议用闪卡把 Day 1-7 的重点单词再过一遍。
dailyTip_zh: 复习日不是"再看一遍"就够了,而要主动开口输出。把前七天的句型混着用,试着不看笔记讲一段关于自己的话。犯错很正常——错误正是大脑巩固记忆的地方。今天多录几段音频,和自己的示范对比,你会发现进步比想象中快。

title_zh: 你喜欢做什么？——爱好与喜好
goals: 能用 like / love / hate / enjoy + 动词-ing 说出自己喜欢和讨厌做的三件事
能用 Do you...? / Does he/she...? 提问别人的爱好，并做简短回答 (Yes, I do. / No, she doesn't.)
能听懂一段关于业余爱好的对话，抓住谁喜欢什么、谁不喜欢什么
能自然发出 -ing 的 /ŋ/ 尾音和 enjoy 里的 /dʒ/ 音

grammarNote.point_en: like / love / hate / enjoy + verb-ing; and do/does questions
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 表达喜好时，like / love / hate / enjoy 后面接动词的 -ing 形式：I like reading.（我喜欢阅读。）love 比 like 更强烈，hate 表示讨厌，enjoy 表示享受其中。提问用 Do 或 Does：主语是 I / you / we / they 用 Do（Do you like cooking?）；主语是 he / she / it 用 Does，并且后面动词回原形（Does she like cooking? 不是 likes）。简短回答：Yes, I do. / No, I don't. / Yes, she does. / No, she doesn't.

examples.zh: 我很喜欢听音乐。

你最喜欢的爱好是什么？

My son likes to draw cars.

listening.title: Two Friends Talk About Their Hobbies
listening.script:
A: Hi, Ben! What do you like doing in your free time?
B: Hi, Mia! I love playing football. I play every weekend with my friends. What about you?
A: I don't like football. It's boring for me. But I really enjoy swimming.
B: Swimming? Nice! Do you swim every day?
A: No, I don't. I go swimming three times a week, in the morning.
B: Cool. Does your sister like swimming too?
A: No, she doesn't. She hates swimming. She loves painting and drawing.
B: Painting is fun! My brother enjoys music. He loves singing and dancing.
A: Really? Can he sing well?
B: Yes, he can! We often sing together at home. It's a lot of fun.
A: That's great. I love music too. I listen to music every day.
B: Me too! Hey, do you want to go swimming with me on Sunday?
A: Yes, I do! See you on Sunday.

targetSounds: -ing /ŋ/：这是一个鼻音，舌头后部抬起靠近软腭，气从鼻子出，不要在结尾加一个 g 或 k 的爆破音。singing 读作 /ˈsɪŋɪŋ/，两个 -ng 都要软而不断。
/dʒ/ (enjoy, game)：像中文'知'的浊音版本，双唇稍向前，先短暂堵住气，再放开。enjoy /ɪnˈdʒɔɪ/、game /ɡeɪm/ 里的对比感受一下。
连读 What do you：口语里 do you 常弱读成 /djə/，听起来像 'Whatdya like doing?'，跟读时轻快带过。

shadowing.tip: doesn't /ˈdʌz.ənt/ 的 s 是 /z/ 音；hates 尾音 /ts/ 干脆。

shadowing.text: He loves singing and dancing.
shadowing.tip: singing 和 dancing 都以 /ŋ/ 结尾，and 弱读成 /ən/。

shadowing.text: It's a lot of fun.
shadowing.tip: lot of 连读成 /ˈlɒ.təv/，fun 的 /ʌ/ 短而清。

shadowing.text: Yes, I do! I really like it.
shadowing.tip: 重音落在 do 上表示肯定，really 拉长以示热情。

speaking.speakingTask: 录一段 30 秒的自我介绍音频：说出你喜欢做的两件事和讨厌做的一件事，用 love / enjoy / hate + -ing。例如：'In my free time, I love reading and I enjoy cooking, but I hate washing dishes.'

reading.title: Anna's Family and Their Hobbies
reading.passage:
Anna lives with her family in a small house. Everyone has a different hobby. Anna loves reading. She reads a book every night before she sleeps. Her free time is very quiet and happy.

Her father enjoys cooking. On Sundays, he makes lunch for the family, and they all eat together. He says cooking is fun, not boring.

Anna's mother loves music. She likes singing in the kitchen, and sometimes she dances too. Her brother, Tom, is different. He hates reading and singing. He really likes sport. He goes running in the morning and plays football with friends after school.

"Do you like the same things?" people ask. "No, we don't!" says Anna. "But we are happy together. In the evening, we watch a film or play a game. That is my favorite time of the day."

comprehension.q: What does Anna love doing?
comprehension.a: She loves reading. She reads a book every night before she sleeps.

comprehension.q: What does Anna's father do on Sundays?
comprehension.a: He cooks lunch for the family, and they eat together.

comprehension.q: What does Tom hate, and what does he like?
comprehension.a: He hates reading and singing, but he really likes sport (running and football).

comprehension.q: Does the family like the same things?
comprehension.a: No, they don't, but they are happy together.

comprehension.q: What is Anna's favorite time of the day?
comprehension.a: The evening, when they watch a film or play a game together.

writing.prompt: 写 5-7 句话，介绍你和你家人（或朋友）的爱好。用 like / love / hate / enjoy + -ing，并至少用一个 Do/Does 问句。
usefulPhrases: In my free time, I love ...ing
writing.modelAnswer: In my free time, I love reading and listening to music. My favorite hobby is running. I go running every morning before work. My wife enjoys cooking, and we cook dinner together on weekends. My son hates reading, but he really likes playing football. He is good at sport. Do you like the same hobbies as your family? For me, our best time is the evening. We watch a film together, and it is a lot of fun.

Do/Does 用对了吗？（he/she/it 用 Does，且后面动词回原形）
句子首字母大写、句末有句号或问号吗？
有没有至少一个 Do/Does 问句？
单词拼写正确吗（如 favourite, enjoy, swimming 双写 m）？

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 5 日常作息词汇与一般现在时（get up, go to work, every day, in the morning）——今天的对话/阅读把它们和爱好结合了；复习 Day 5 的频率副词与 three times a week 表达。复习 Day 4 家庭成员词（father, mother, brother, sister）——用在描述'谁的爱好'里。复习 Day 6 饮食词（cook, eat, lunch, dinner）与 Day 4 的 have/has。用词卡把 Day 1-8 中标记为'到期'的词过一遍（SM-2 队列），重点回顾 Day 5 的 -s/-es 结尾 /s/,/z/,/ɪz/ 发音，因为它和今天 does/hates 的尾音相关。
dailyTip_zh: 今天的关键是'开口说自己'。做完影子跟读后，别只是读句子——把 shadowing 里的句型换成你真实的爱好，大声说三遍并录音。听回放时只关注一件事：-ing 的鼻音 /ŋ/ 有没有干净收尾。每天只盯一个发音点，进步最快。

title_zh: 购物与金钱
goals: 能在商店用 How much is this? / How much are these? 询问价格
能用 this / that / these / those 指出想买的东西
能听懂店员报的价格，并做出回应（买 / 不买 / 太贵了）
能完成一次简单的购物对话，包括付钱和找零

grammarNote.point_en: How much / How many + this / that / these / those
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 1) 问价格用 How much：单数用 is（How much is this bag?），复数用 are（How much are these shoes?）。2) How much 也用来问不可数名词的量（How much rice?）；How many 用来问可数复数名词的数量（How many apples?）。3) 指示词：this / that 指单数（this = 近的，that = 远的），these / those 指复数（these = 近的，those = 远的）。口诀：近 this / these，远 that / those；一个用 this / that，多个用 these / those。

listening.title: At the Clothes Shop 在服装店
listening.script:
A: Hello! Can I help you?
B: Yes, please. How much is this shirt?
A: This blue shirt? It's fifteen dollars.
B: Fifteen dollars. That's cheap! And how much are these shoes?
A: Those black shoes are forty dollars.
B: Oh, forty dollars is expensive. Do you have a smaller price?
A: This shirt is cheap, but the shoes are new. Sorry.
B: OK. I like this shirt very much. I want to buy it.
A: Great! What size do you need?
B: I need a medium, please. Do you take cash?
A: Yes, we take cash and card.
B: Here is twenty dollars.
A: Thank you. Here is your change, five dollars. And here is your receipt.
B: Thank you very much!
A: You're welcome. Have a nice day!
B: You too. Goodbye!

问句 How much 的语调：句尾自然下降（wh- 疑问句降调），如 'How much is this?↘'

reading.title: Anna Goes Shopping 安娜去购物
reading.passage:
It is Saturday. Anna needs some new shoes and a bag. She goes to the market near her home. The market is big, and it has many shops.

First, Anna looks at some shoes. "How much are these black shoes?" she asks. "They are thirty dollars," says the man. "That is cheap!" Anna says. She likes them, and she buys them.

Then Anna sees a nice bag. "How much is this bag?" she asks. "That bag is sixty dollars," says the woman. "Oh, sixty dollars is too expensive," says Anna. She does not buy it.

Anna has thirty dollars now. She wants some fruit too. At the fruit shop, apples are cheap. She buys four red apples. "How much is that?" she asks. "Two dollars, please." Anna pays with cash and gets her change. She is happy. She has new shoes, sweet apples, and a little money.

comprehension.q: Where does Anna go shopping?
comprehension.a: She goes to the market near her home.

comprehension.q: How much are the black shoes?
comprehension.a: They are thirty dollars.

comprehension.q: Why does Anna not buy the bag?
comprehension.a: Because it is too expensive (sixty dollars).

comprehension.q: How many apples does Anna buy?
comprehension.a: She buys four apples.

comprehension.q: How does Anna pay for the apples?
comprehension.a: She pays with cash.

writing.prompt: Write about a shopping trip (real or imagined). What do you want to buy? How much is it? What do you buy, and how do you pay? Use How much, this/that/these/those, and price words. 写一次购物（真实的或想象的）：你想买什么？多少钱？你买了什么，怎么付钱？用上 How much、this/that/these/those 和价格相关的词。
usefulPhrases: I pay by card / with cash.
writing.modelAnswer: On Sunday I go shopping at the market. I want a new shirt and some shoes. "How much is this white shirt?" I ask. It is twelve dollars. That is cheap, so I buy it. Then I see some shoes. "How much are those shoes?" They are fifty dollars. That is too expensive, so I don't buy them. I pay for the shirt with cash and get my change. I am happy.
selfCheck: 我问单数东西时用了 How much is ...? 吗？问复数东西时用了 How much are ...? 吗？
近的东西用了 this/these，远的东西用了 that/those 吗？
价格后面用了 dollars/cents，句子里 is/are 用对了吗？
我说了怎么付钱（by card / with cash）吗？
每个句子都有主语和动词，句首大写、句末有标点吗？

reviewFocus: 复习第 6 天的食物与数量词（some/any、countable/uncountable：apples 可数用 How many，rice 不可数用 How much），今天在购物中自然再现。复习第 3 天的数字（用于报价格 fifteen/fifty、forty，注意 -teen 与 -ty 重音区别）和第 9 天的 like/love + 名词（"I like this shirt"）。复习第 5 天 do/does 疑问句结构（"Do you take cash?"）。快速自测：用 How much / How many 各造 2 个购物句子，并用 this/that/these/those 各说一个物品。
dailyTip_zh: 把今天学的价格问句变成"随身脚本"：出门看到任何东西，都在心里默念 "How much is this?" 或 "How much are these?"。学语言最快的方法是把课本句子用在真实场景里——哪怕只是对着货架小声练习，大脑也会当成真实交流来记忆。今天目标：至少大声说 20 遍带 /ʃ/ 的词（shop, shirt, shoes, cash），让这个音变成肌肉记忆。

title_en: Excuse me, where is the station?
title_zh: 请问,车站在哪里?——问路与城里的地方
goals: 能听懂并给出简单的路线指示(turn left / go straight / it's on your right)
能用祈使句告诉别人怎么走,并使用 next to / near / between 等位置词
能说出城里常见地点的名称(bank, station, park, hospital 等)并礼貌地问路
能听一段问路对话并画出/说出正确的路线

grammarNote.point_en: Imperatives + prepositions of movement (Go / Turn / Cross ...; along, across, into, up, down, past)
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 1) 祈使句:直接用动词原形来给指示或命令,不需要主语。肯定形式:Go straight. Turn left. Cross the road. 否定形式在动词前加 don't:Don't turn here. 加 please 更礼貌:Please take the second street. 2) 移动介词(表示方向/路径,和 Day 7 的静态位置词 in/on/under 不同):go along the street(沿着), go across / cross the road(穿过), go into the shop(进入), go up / down the street(往上/往下走), go past the bank(经过), go to the station(到)。常用搭配:go straight on(一直走), turn left/right(左转/右转), take the first/second turning(走第一个/第二个路口)。

examples.en: Go straight on and turn left at the bank.
examples.zh: 一直往前走,在银行那里左转。

examples.en: Cross the road and walk past the park.
examples.zh: 过马路,然后走过公园。

examples.en: Don't turn here. Take the second street on the right.
examples.zh: 别在这里转。走右边第二条街。

examples.en: Walk along this street and the station is on your left.
examples.zh: 沿着这条街走,车站就在你的左边。

vocabulary.meaning_zh: 打扰一下,请问(礼貌搭话)
vocabulary.example_en: Excuse me, where is the bank?
My hotel is on this street.
The shop is on the corner.
The park is on your right.
Go straight on for two minutes.
Cross the street at the lights.
The bank is across the road.
It's between the bank and the shop.
The café is next to the station.
Is there a bank near here?
The train station is very big.
I need to go to the bank.
The hospital is near the park.
We can walk in the park.
vocabulary.example_zh: 我们可以在公园里散步。

vocabulary.example_en: Is this the way to the museum?
I am lost. Can you help me?
Turn left at the traffic lights.

listening.title: Where is the train station?
listening.script:
A: Excuse me. Can you help me? I am lost.
B: Of course. Where do you want to go?
A: I want to go to the train station. Is it far?
B: No, it's not far. It's about five minutes on foot.
A: Great. How do I get there?
B: OK. Go straight on along this street. Then cross the road at the traffic lights.
A: Cross the road. OK.
B: Yes. Walk past the bank and turn right at the corner.
A: Turn right at the corner. And then?
B: The station is on your left, next to a big park. You can't miss it.
A: Is there a café near the station?
B: Yes. There is a small café between the station and the bank. The coffee is very good.
A: Thank you so much! You are very kind.
B: You're welcome. Have a nice day!

Then ____ the road at the traffic lights.
Walk past the bank and turn ____ at the corner.
The station is on your ____, next to a big park.
There is a small café ____ the station and the bank.
It's about five minutes ____ foot.

comprehension.q: Where does person A want to go?
comprehension.a: To the train station.

comprehension.q: Is the station far?
comprehension.a: No. It is about five minutes on foot.

comprehension.q: Where must A turn right?
comprehension.a: At the corner, after the bank.

comprehension.q: What is next to the station?
comprehension.a: A big park.

comprehension.q: Where is the small café?
comprehension.a: Between the station and the bank.

targetSounds: Stress in commands(祈使句重读):祈使句里,把重音放在动词和方向词上,如 GO STRAIGHT, TURN LEFT, CROSS the ROAD。语气坚定、下降调,听起来清楚有力。
Clear /l/(清亮 l,在元音前):出现在单词开头或元音前,如 left, along, lost。舌尖轻触上齿龈,声音明亮。
Dark /l/(浊暗 l,在词尾或辅音前):如 well, hospital, still, cross the pool。舌尖仍触上齿龈,但舌后部抬高,声音更闷、更靠后。

shadowing.text: Excuse me, where is the station?
shadowing.tip: Excuse me 连读成 /ɪkˈskjuːzmi/,句尾 station 用升调,显得礼貌。

shadowing.text: Go straight on along this street.
shadowing.tip: GO 和 STRAIGHT 重读;along 是清亮 /l/,舌尖轻触上齿龈。

shadowing.text: Turn left at the corner.
shadowing.tip: TURN LEFT 两个词都重读;left 开头是清亮 /l/。

shadowing.text: Turn right at the traffic lights.
shadowing.tip: right 的 /r/ 圆唇,lights 词尾是浊暗 /l/,声音偏闷。

shadowing.text: Cross the road here.
shadowing.tip: CROSS 重读,cross the 轻轻连读成 /krɒs ðə/。

shadowing.text: Walk past the bank.
shadowing.tip: WALK 里的 l 不发音;past 的 t 轻碰即可。

shadowing.text: It's on your left, next to the park.
shadowing.tip: left 是清亮 l,句子用下降调表示确定。

shadowing.text: The hospital is near here.
shadowing.tip: hospital 词尾 -tal 是浊暗 /l/,读作 /ˈhɒspɪtl̩/,声音靠后。

shadowing.text: Don't turn here. It's the wrong way.
shadowing.tip: Don't 重读表示提醒;wrong way 两词都清楚。

shadowing.text: You can't miss it. It's on the corner.
shadowing.tip: can't 里的 t 常省略,快速带过;corner 用下降调收尾。

speaking.speakingTask: Imagine a tourist stops you and asks: 'Excuse me, how do I get to the train station?' Record yourself giving directions in 2-3 sentences. Use at least three imperatives (Go..., Turn..., Cross...) and one place word (next to / near / between).

reading.title: A walk to the market
reading.passage:
Anna is new in this town. Today she wants to go to the market. She has a small map, but she is a little lost. She sees a kind man near the park and says, "Excuse me, where is the market?"

The man smiles. "It's very near," he says. "Go straight on along this road. Cross the street at the traffic lights and walk past the bank. Then turn right at the corner. The market is on your left, next to the station."

Anna says thank you and walks along the road. She crosses the street and goes past the bank. At the corner she turns right. There it is! The market is between the station and a big park. It is not far at all. Anna is very happy. She likes this friendly town.

comprehension.q: Where does Anna want to go?
comprehension.a: To the market.

comprehension.q: Why does Anna feel a little lost?
comprehension.a: She is new in the town and only has a small map.

comprehension.q: What must Anna do at the traffic lights?
comprehension.a: Cross the street.

comprehension.q: Where does she turn right?
comprehension.a: At the corner, after the bank.

comprehension.q: Where is the market?
comprehension.a: Between the station and a big park, on her left.

writing.prompt: A friend will visit your home for the first time. Write short directions from the bus station or train station to your home. Use imperatives and movement/place words.
usefulPhrases: Come out of the station and turn left/right.
Cross the road at the traffic lights.
Walk past the bank / the park / the shop.
My home is on your left/right, next to ...
It is not far. It's about ... minutes on foot.
writing.modelAnswer: Hi Tom! Here are the directions to my home. Come out of the train station and turn left. Go straight on along Green Street for two minutes. Cross the road at the traffic lights and walk past the small park. Then turn right at the corner. My home is the third house on your left, next to a big tree. It is not far, only five minutes on foot. Call me if you are lost. See you soon!
selfCheck: 我用了至少三个祈使句(Go... / Turn... / Cross...)吗?
我用了移动介词(along / past / across)和位置词(next to / between / on your left)吗?
祈使句都用动词原形开头,没有加主语吗?

reviewFocus: 复习第7天的静态位置介词(in / on / under / next to / behind)并和今天的移动介词(along / across / past / into)对比,注意“位置”与“方向”的不同。复习第3天的时间/数字来说“five minutes on foot”“turn at the second street”。复习第10天的 this/that 和 How much(“How far is it?”仿照“How much”句型)。在今天的对话里,把第1天的问候 (Excuse me / Thank you / You're welcome / Have a nice day) 和第6天的 There is / There are(There is a café near here)自然地再用一次。
dailyTip_zh: 学路线指示最好的方法是“边说边动手”:一边大声说 Go straight, turn left,一边用手指在桌上或地图上比划出路线。把身体和语言连起来,记得更牢、说得更自然。今天可以对着家附近的真实地图,用英语给自己带一次路。

title_zh: 昨天你做了什么？（一般过去时·规则动词）
goals: 能用规则动词 -ed 讲述昨天做过的 5 件事（I worked, I cooked, I watched...）
能正确读出 -ed 的三种发音 /t/、/d/、/ɪd/，并听辨它们的不同
能用 Did you...? 提问过去的事，并用 Yes, I did / No, I didn't 回答
能听懂并复述一段关于昨天一天安排的 A2 独白，写出 40-80 词的‘我的昨天’短文

grammarNote.point_en: Past simple with regular verbs: verb + -ed
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 一般过去时表示‘昨天/过去’发生并已结束的动作。规则动词在词尾加 -ed：work→worked, play→played。三条拼写规则：(1) 一般直接加 -ed（cook→cooked）；(2) 以 e 结尾只加 -d（like→liked）；(3) 以‘辅音+y’结尾把 y 变 i 再加 -ed（study→studied）。重要：过去时的动词形式不随人称变化，I/you/he/she/we/they 都用同一个 -ed 形式（he worked，不是 he workeds）。否定和疑问用助动词 did：否定 didn't + 动词原形（I didn't work，注意后面用原形 work 不用 worked）；疑问 Did you work? 回答 Yes, I did. / No, I didn't。

examples.en: I worked at home yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天在家工作。

examples.en: She watched TV last night.
examples.zh: 她昨晚看了电视。

examples.en: We studied English yesterday.
examples.zh: 我们昨天学了英语。

examples.en: Did you call your mother yesterday?
examples.zh: 你昨天给妈妈打电话了吗？

examples.en: No, I didn't cook. I ordered food.
examples.zh: 没有，我没做饭。我点了外卖。

vocabulary.example_en: In the morning, I cleaned the house.
I ate lunch, then I worked.
I was very tired at night.

listening.title: Anna's Busy Day (安娜忙碌的一天)
listening.script: Hello! My name is Anna. Let me tell you about my day yesterday. It was a very busy day. My morning started early. I opened my eyes at six o'clock. First, I washed my face and I cooked a small breakfast. Then I cleaned the kitchen. At eight, I walked to the office. I worked for many hours. At lunch, I called my sister and we talked for ten minutes. In the afternoon, it rained, so I stayed inside. I finished my work at six. In the evening, I wanted to relax. I watched a movie and I listened to some music. My husband helped me, and we washed the dishes together. Later, I studied English for thirty minutes. At ten o'clock, I closed my book. I was very tired, but it was a good day. What did you do yesterday?

dictation.sentence: My morning ____ early.
First, I ____ my face and I ____ a small breakfast.
At eight, I ____ to the office.
In the afternoon, it ____, so I ____ inside.
I ____ a movie and I ____ to some music.
Later, I ____ English for thirty minutes.

comprehension.q: What time did Anna open her eyes?
comprehension.a: She opened her eyes at six o'clock.

comprehension.q: How did Anna go to the office?
comprehension.a: She walked to the office.

comprehension.q: Why did Anna stay inside in the afternoon?
comprehension.a: Because it rained.

comprehension.q: What did Anna do in the evening?
comprehension.a: She watched a movie and listened to music.

comprehension.q: Who helped Anna wash the dishes?
comprehension.a: Her husband helped her.

targetSounds: /t/ 结尾（清辅音后）：worked, watched, washed, cooked, helped —— -ed 只发一个轻轻的 /t/，不要读成‘特-德’，也不加额外音节。
/d/ 结尾（浊辅音或元音后）：played, called, cleaned, listened, opened, stayed, rained —— -ed 发 /d/，同样不加音节。
/ɪd/ 结尾（词尾是 t 或 d 音时）：started, wanted, needed —— 这时才多读一个音节‘id’。判断口诀：只有词尾原音是 /t/ 或 /d/ 才读 /ɪd/。

shadowing.text: I worked all day yesterday.
shadowing.tip: worked 读 /wɜːkt/，-ed 是轻 /t/，一个音节，别读成 work-ed。

shadowing.text: She cooked and cleaned the kitchen.
shadowing.tip: cooked /kʊkt/ 是 /t/，cleaned /kliːnd/ 是 /d/，注意对比。

shadowing.text: We watched a movie last night.
shadowing.tip: watched /wɒtʃt/ 结尾 /t/，watched a 连读，t 轻轻带过。

shadowing.text: He called me in the morning.
shadowing.tip: called /kɔːld/ 是 /d/，called me 中 d 与 m 顺滑相连。

shadowing.text: They played football in the park.
shadowing.tip: played /pleɪd/ 是 /d/，played 一个音节，尾音上扬到 /d/。

shadowing.text: I listened to music and relaxed.
shadowing.tip: listened /ˈlɪsənd/ 是 /d/；listen 中 t 不发音。

shadowing.text: My day started at seven.
shadowing.tip: started /ˈstɑːtɪd/ 词尾原是 t，所以读 /ɪd/，多一个音节‘id’。

shadowing.text: I wanted some tea after work.
shadowing.tip: wanted /ˈwɒntɪd/ 读 /ɪd/，wanted 是两个音节：wan-tid。

shadowing.text: We stayed home because it rained.
shadowing.tip: stayed /steɪd/ 和 rained /reɪnd/ 都是 /d/，注意都不加音节。

shadowing.text: I opened the window and washed my hands.
shadowing.tip: opened /ˈəʊpənd/ 是 /d/，washed /wɒʃt/ 是 /t/，一句里两种音都练到。

miniDialogue.speaker: A
miniDialogue.line: Hi! What did you do yesterday?

miniDialogue.speaker: B

speaking.speakingTask: Record yourself talking about YOUR day yesterday. Say at least five sentences using -ed verbs. For example: "Yesterday I worked, I cooked lunch, I called a friend, I watched TV, and I studied English. It was a busy day."

reading.title: A Rainy Sunday (下雨的星期天)
reading.passage: Yesterday was Sunday. It rained all morning, so my family stayed at home. I started my day at eight o'clock. First, I cleaned my room and washed my clothes. My mother cooked a big breakfast for everyone. We wanted hot tea, so my father opened the kitchen window and boiled some water. After breakfast, my brother and I watched an old movie. Then we played a card game and listened to music. In the afternoon, I helped my mother in the kitchen. We talked and laughed a lot. Later, I studied English for one hour. I called my best friend, and we talked about our week. At night, the rain stopped. I closed my books and looked outside. The sky was clear. I was tired, but I was happy. It was a quiet and good day.

glossary.meaning_zh: 煮沸（boil 的过去式，-ed 发 /d/）
笑（laugh 的过去式，-ed 发 /t/）

comprehension.q: What day was it, and how was the weather in the morning?
comprehension.a: It was Sunday, and it rained all morning.

comprehension.q: What did the mother do?
comprehension.a: She cooked a big breakfast for everyone.

comprehension.q: What did the writer and the brother do after breakfast?
comprehension.a: They watched an old movie, then played a card game and listened to music.

comprehension.q: Who did the writer call, and what did they talk about?
comprehension.a: The writer called their best friend, and they talked about their week.

comprehension.q: How did the writer feel at the end of the day?
comprehension.a: Tired but happy; it was a quiet and good day.

writing.prompt: Write about your day yesterday (My Yesterday). Use at least six regular past verbs with -ed. Describe your morning, afternoon, and evening in order. (写一写你的昨天：早上、下午、晚上分别做了什么，至少用 6 个 -ed 规则动词。)
usefulPhrases: It was a busy / quiet / good day.
writing.modelAnswer: Yesterday was a normal day, but I was very busy. In the morning, I started work at nine o'clock. I worked for four hours and answered many emails. At lunch, I cooked some noodles and called my mother. In the afternoon, I cleaned my room and washed my clothes. Then I studied English for one hour. In the evening, I watched a short movie and listened to music. Later, I helped my sister with her homework. At ten, I closed my computer. I was tired, but it was a good day.
selfCheck: 我是否用了至少 6 个 -ed 规则动词？（数一数：worked, cooked, cleaned...）
每个动词都是过去式吗？有没有忘记加 -ed？
否定句我用的是 didn't + 动词原形吗（如 I didn't cook，而不是 didn't cooked）？
我是否按早上/下午/晚上的顺序，并用了 then、after that 等连接词？
读出声时，-ed 的 /t/ /d/ /ɪd/ 三种发音我判断对了吗？

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 5（一般现在时日常作息动词：get up, eat, go, work）——对比现在时与今天的过去时，把昨天的动作改写成过去式。复习 Day 3 的时间表达（at seven, at six o'clock）并在‘昨天’句子里复用，如 My day started at seven。复习 Day 11 的祈使/地点介词（walk to the park, stayed inside）。词卡队列按 SM-2 优先复习 Day 5 与 Day 9 到期词（like/love + -ing，enjoy），用它们造过去式句子如 I enjoyed the movie。
dailyTip_zh: -ed 发音别死记，用‘手放喉咙’小技巧：动词原形最后一个音如果喉咙不震动（/k/、/ʃ/、/tʃ/、/p/ 等清音），-ed 就读 /t/；如果震动或是元音，就读 /d/；只有最后是 t/d 音时才读多一个音节的 /ɪd/。今天大声跟读 10 句影子句，把每个 -ed 读法说对 3 遍，比看 10 遍规则更有效。

title_zh: 我的周末
goals: 能用 went / saw / had 等不规则过去式，说出上个周末做了什么（3-4 件事）
能听懂并复述一段关于周末活动的对话，抓住 was / were 的弱读
能就 'What did you do at the weekend?' 进行至少 6 个来回的自然问答
能写出 5-6 句关于自己周末的小短文，正确使用不规则过去式

grammarNote.point_en: Past simple: irregular verbs (go→went, see→saw, have→had) + was/were
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 表示昨天或上周末发生的动作用过去式。很多常用动词是【不规则】的，不加 -ed，要单独记忆：go→went（去），see→saw（看见），have→had（有/吃），do→did，get→got，meet→met，buy→bought，take→took，eat→ate。否定和疑问用 didn't / did，后面用【动词原形】：I didn't go. / Did you see it? be 动词过去式是 was（I/he/she/it）和 were（you/we/they）。自然语速里 was/were 常读弱读音 /wəz/、/wə/，很轻，重点听它后面的词。

listening.title: How was your weekend?
listening.script:
A: Hi, Ben! How was your weekend?
B: Oh, it was great, thanks. On Saturday I went to the beach with my family.
A: Nice! Was the weather good?
B: Yes, it was very sunny. We had lunch there and the kids played games.
A: Lovely. What about Sunday?
B: On Sunday we were a bit tired, so we stayed at home. In the afternoon I saw a film with my brother.
A: A good one?
B: Yes, it was really fun. And you? What did you do?
A: Well, on Saturday I visited my grandma. We had tea together and went for a walk in the park.
B: That sounds nice. Were your friends there too?
A: No, they weren't. It was just me and my grandma. On Sunday I did nothing. I just relaxed at home!
B: Ha, sometimes a quiet weekend is the best!

targetSounds: was 弱读 /wəz/：句中不重读，读得很短很轻，例如 'It was sunny' 听起来像 'it-wuz-sunny'
were 弱读 /wə/：句中读成轻轻的 /wə/，例如 'They were tired' 像 'they-wuh-tired'，重音落在 tired 上
强读对比：在句尾或短答里才重读，如 'Yes, it WAS.' / 'No, they WEREN'T.'

reading.title: Anna's Weekend
reading.passage:
Last weekend was really nice for Anna. On Saturday morning she went to the market and bought some fruit. Then she met her friend Lucy at a small cafe. They had coffee and cake together, and they talked for two hours. The weather was sunny, so after that they went for a walk in the park.

On Saturday evening, Anna and Lucy went to the cinema. They saw a funny film and laughed a lot. It was a great evening.

On Sunday, Anna was a bit tired. She stayed at home in the morning and relaxed. In the afternoon her brother came to visit, and they had lunch together. They played a game and watched TV.

On Sunday night, Anna was happy but tired. "What a fun weekend!" she said.

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 12 的规则过去式 -ed（visited、played、talked、watched、laughed、relaxed）及其三种发音 /t/、/d/、/ɪd/，把它们和今天的不规则动词放在一起对比朗读。复习 Day 9 的兴趣爱好词（like/love + -ing、enjoy）用来描述周末活动；复习 Day 3 的星期与介词（on Saturday / on Sunday, in the morning/afternoon/evening）；复习 Day 6 的餐饮词（lunch、coffee、cake）自然融入'had ...'句型。建议把今天的 went/saw/had/met 加入你的抽认卡（SRS），明天再回顾一次。
dailyTip_zh: 不规则动词没有捷径，最好的办法是"成对记忆 + 造句"：把 go→went、see→saw、have→had 三对写在卡片上，每一对立刻用自己的真实周末造一个句子并大声说出来。今天只要牢牢掌握这 3 对就够了，明天用 SRS 再见一次，记得又快又牢。开口说比默读更有效，别怕出错！

title_zh: 天气怎么样？——天气与季节
goals: 能说出今天的天气：It is sunny / cloudy / rainy / cold. 等（用 It is + 形容词）
能用 going to 做简单天气预报：It is going to rain tomorrow.
能听懂并回答关于天气和季节的简单问题（春夏秋冬）
能正确发出 /aʊ/ 音（cloud, now, how）并在句子里做基本连读

grammarNote.point_en: It is + adjective (weather) & going to for a forecast
grammarNote.explanation_zh:
1) 描述天气用 It is + 形容词。这里的 It 是虚主语，不指具体东西，专门用来说天气、时间。例：It is hot.（天热。）It is windy today.（今天有风。）口语常缩写成 It's：It's cold.
2) 预报即将发生的天气，用 be going to + 动词原形，表示“根据现在的情况，将要……”。结构：主语 + be(am/is/are) + going to + 动词。天气常用 It is going to...：It is going to rain.（要下雨了。）问句：Is it going to snow?（会下雪吗？）否定：It is not going to be sunny.
注意：going to 后面接动词原形（rain, snow, be），不要接名词。说“天要变冷”是 It is going to be cold，别忘了 be。

listening.title: The Weather Report / 天气预报
listening.script:
A: Good morning! What is the weather like today?
B: Good morning! It is cloudy now, but it is not cold. It is warm.
A: Is it going to rain? I want to go to the park.
B: Let me check the phone. Yes, look at these clouds. It is going to rain this afternoon.
A: Oh no. Should I take an umbrella?
B: Yes, take an umbrella. And it is going to be windy too.
A: What about tomorrow? Is it going to be sunny?
B: Tomorrow is better. It is going to be sunny and dry. About twenty-five degrees.
A: That is good. I love sunny days. What is your favorite season?
B: I love summer. It is hot and I can swim. How about you?
A: I like autumn. It is cool and the sky is blue. But winter is too cold for me.
B: Yes, winter is cold here. It snows a lot. Well, have a nice day! Do not forget your umbrella!
A: Thank you. See you later!

/w/ 音（warm, windy, weather）：双唇收圆再张开，不要读成 /v/

speaking.speakingTask: Record a 30-second weather report for your city today. Say: what the weather is like now (It is ...), and what it is going to be like tomorrow (It is going to ...). Use at least one season word.

reading.title: The Four Seasons / 四季
reading.passage:
There are four seasons in one year: spring, summer, autumn, and winter. Every season has different weather.

In spring, it is warm. The sky is often blue, and flowers grow. Sometimes it rains, so I take an umbrella.

Summer is my favorite season. It is very hot and sunny. It is about thirty degrees. My family and I go to the beach and swim in the sea.

In autumn, it is cool and windy. The leaves fall from the trees. I like to walk in the park when it is dry.

Winter is cold. Sometimes it snows, and everything is white. I stay at home and drink hot tea. The days are short and the nights are long.

What is the weather like today? Look at the sky! It is cloudy now, but the phone says it is going to be sunny tomorrow.

comprehension.a: Because it is hot and sunny, and they can go to the beach and swim.

comprehension.q: What does the writer do in winter?
comprehension.a: They stay at home and drink hot tea.

comprehension.q: What is it going to be like tomorrow?
comprehension.a: It is going to be sunny.

reviewFocus: 复习第 13 天的不规则过去式（went / saw / had）和 was/were 弱读：用英语说一句上周末的天气，如 "Last Sunday it was rainy, so I stayed home and watched TV." 复习第 9 天 like/love + 名词/-ing（I love swimming in summer）；复习第 5 天频率副词（It sometimes rains in spring / It is often cold in winter）；复习第 3 天数字，用来读温度（twenty-five degrees）。每天开口把昨天学的 5 个词再用一遍，防止遗忘。
dailyTip_zh: 天气是每天都能用的“真实语料”！养成习惯：每天早上起床看看窗外，用英语对自己说一句 "It is ... today" 和一句 "It is going to ... tomorrow"。把学习和生活绑在一起，词汇才不会忘。发 /aʊ/ 时可以把手放在下巴上，感受嘴巴从大到小的变化。

title_en: At the Doctor: How Are You Feeling?
title_zh: 看医生：你感觉怎么样？
goals: 能说出主要身体部位（head, throat, stomach 等）并描述常见症状（I've got a headache.）
能用 should / shouldn't 给出或听懂健康建议（You should rest. You shouldn't work too much.）
能在诊所进行简单对话：说出不舒服的地方、听懂医生的问题和建议
能正确发出 /h/ 音，并把重音放在建议句的关键词上

grammarNote.point_en: should / shouldn't for advice; have got a ... for problems & symptoms
grammarNote.explanation_zh:
1) should / shouldn't 表示建议。结构：主语 + should / shouldn't + 动词原形。should = 应该（好建议），shouldn't = 不应该。例如 You should drink water.（你应该多喝水。）You shouldn't smoke.（你不该抽烟。）注意：should 后面永远用动词原形，不加 to，不加 -s。问句：Should I see a doctor?（我该去看医生吗？）
2) have got a ... 用来说身体问题或症状，很口语。I've got = I have got。结构：主语 + have got / has got + a + 问题。例如 I've got a cold.（我感冒了。）He's got a headache.（他头疼。）第三人称单数用 has got（She's got a fever.）。这里的 have got 意思和 have 一样，但在英式口语里更自然，也和第4天学的 have got（家人）呼应。

examples.en: I've got a headache. I should take some medicine.
examples.zh: 我头疼。我应该吃点药。

examples.en: You've got a fever. You shouldn't go to work today.
examples.zh: 你发烧了。你今天不该去上班。

examples.en: She's got a bad cough. She should see a doctor.

listening.title: At the Doctor's Office
listening.script:
A: Good morning. Please sit down. How are you feeling today?
B: Not very good, doctor. I've got a bad headache and a sore throat.
A: I see. When did this problem start?
B: It started two days ago. I feel very tired, and last night I had a fever.
A: OK. Do you have a cough too?
B: Yes, a little. My head really hurts.
A: Well, you've got a bad cold. It's not serious, but you should rest.
B: Should I take some medicine?
A: Yes. Take this medicine two times a day. You should drink a lot of water.
B: OK. Can I go to work tomorrow?
A: No, you shouldn't go to work. You should stay home and sleep. You need rest.
B: I understand. Thank you, doctor.
A: You're welcome. Drink water, sleep well, and you'll feel better soon.
B: Thank you very much. Goodbye.
A: Goodbye. Take care!

comprehension.a: No. The doctor says he shouldn't go to work; he should stay home.

targetSounds: /h/ 音：发音时先轻轻呼一口气，像哈气一样，声带不振动。练习 head, hand, have, healthy, hospital, hurt。中文里没有真正对应的音，注意不要发成很重的‘喝’。
建议句的句子重音（sentence stress）：说 should / shouldn't 建议时，把重音放在关键动词和名词上，其他小词读轻一点。例如 You should REST. / You shouldn't WORK too much. 重读大写词，其余滑过去。

shadowing.tip: How 的 /h/ 要轻轻送气；句尾 today 稍微上扬。

shadowing.text: I've got a headache.
shadowing.tip: I've 连读成一个音；head- 的 /h/ 送气清楚。

shadowing.tip: hurts 的 /h/ 送气，really 重读表示强调。

shadowing.text: You should rest at home.

shadowing.text: You shouldn't go to work.

speaking.speakingTask: Imagine you feel sick. Record yourself telling a doctor: say two problems you've got (for example, 'I've got a headache and a sore throat.'), then give yourself two pieces of advice using should and shouldn't (for example, 'I should rest. I shouldn't work today.').

reading.title: Tom Is Not Well
reading.passage:
Tom is a bus driver. He works six days a week. This week he is very tired. On Monday he got a cold. He's got a headache, a cough, and a sore throat. His body feels hot, and last night he had a fever.

Tom's wife says, "You look sick. You should not go to work today. You should stay home and rest." But Tom likes his work, so he goes to the hospital first.

The doctor looks at Tom and says, "You've got a bad cold. It is not serious. You should take this medicine two times a day. You should drink a lot of water and sleep well. You shouldn't work this week."

Tom goes home. He takes his medicine and sleeps all day. The next morning he feels much better. "Rest is good for my health," he says. Now Tom knows: when you are ill, you should stop and rest.

comprehension.q: What is Tom's job?
comprehension.a: He is a bus driver.

comprehension.q: What health problems has Tom got?
comprehension.a: A cold: a headache, a cough, a sore throat, and a fever.

comprehension.q: What does the doctor tell Tom to do?
comprehension.a: Take medicine two times a day, drink a lot of water, sleep well, and not work this week.

comprehension.q: How does Tom feel the next morning?
comprehension.a: He feels much better.

writing.prompt: Write a short note to a friend who is sick. Tell them you are sorry they are ill, ask one question about how they feel, and give them two or three pieces of advice using should and shouldn't. (40-80 words)
usefulPhrases: You should rest / drink water / sleep.
I hope you feel better soon.
writing.modelAnswer:
Hi Lily,

I'm sorry you are sick. How are you feeling today? Have you still got a headache?

You should stay home and rest. You should drink a lot of water and sleep well. You shouldn't go to work this week, and you shouldn't eat cold food.

Please take your medicine. I hope you feel better soon!

Your friend,
Anna
selfCheck: 我有没有用到 should 和 shouldn't 各至少一次？
should / shouldn't 后面是不是都用了动词原形（没有加 to 或 -s）？
我有没有问一个关于对方感受的问题（用问号结尾）？
句子开头字母大写、句尾有标点吗？
我描述症状时用了 have got a / has got a 吗？

reviewFocus: 复习第12-14天的过去式，因为病人常常要说昨天/上周发生了什么：用规则过去式（Day 12）和不规则过去式 had/felt/got（Day 13）说 "Last night I had a fever." "I got a cold on Monday."；复习 Day 14 的天气与 going to，把 "It's cold today, so I'm going to stay home." 融进健康话题。同时回收 Day 4 的 have got（家人 → 今天用于症状 have got a cold），Day 6 的食物词（healthy food, water, fruit）来谈健康饮食。今天开始前，先花5分钟大声读 Day 13-14 的 shadowing 句子。
dailyTip_zh: 学身体和看病的词，最好边说边指自己的身体部位：说 head 就摸头，说 throat 就摸喉咙——把词和动作、身体感觉绑在一起，记得更牢也更快能脱口而出。今天的重点是"听"和"说"，请一定跟读（shadowing）诊所对话至少三遍，模仿医生的语气和建议句的重音。

title_en: Week 2 Review: Putting It All Together
title_zh: 第二周复习：把学过的串起来
goals: 能用一般过去时（规则/不规则动词）说出昨天和周末做的事，正确读出 -ed 词尾的三种发音
能谈论天气、爱好、购物，并用 should/shouldn't 给出健康建议
能听懂并复述一段综合本周主题的自然对话，完成听写和问答
能连读弱读形式（was/were, to, and），让口语更自然流畅

grammarNote.point_en: Mixed review: past simple (regular & irregular), like/love + -ing, How much/many, going to (forecast), should/shouldn't
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 今天不学新语法，而是把第9-15天的重点串起来复习。核心：(1) 一般过去时——规则动词加 -ed（played, watched, cooked），不规则动词要背（go→went, see→saw, have→had, buy→bought）；(2) 谈爱好用 like/love/hate + 动词-ing（I love cooking）；(3) 问数量用 How much + 不可数、How many + 可数；(4) 谈天气或预测用 be going to（It's going to rain）；(5) 给建议用 should/shouldn't + 动词原形（You should rest）。把这些放进同一段对话里，就是本周真实的英语。

examples.en: Last weekend I went to the park and played football with my friends.
examples.zh: 上周末我去了公园，和朋友们踢了足球。

examples.en: I love cooking, but I don't like washing the dishes.
examples.zh: 我喜欢做饭，但不喜欢洗碗。

examples.en: How much water did you drink today? You should drink more.
examples.zh: 你今天喝了多少水？你应该多喝点。

examples.en: It's cloudy now, and it's going to rain later, so take an umbrella.
examples.zh: 现在多云，等会儿要下雨了，所以带把伞。

listening.title: How Was Your Weekend?
listening.script:
A: Hi Mia! How was your weekend?
B: Hi Tom! It was really nice, thank you. On Saturday I went shopping with my sister.
A: Nice! What did you buy?
B: I bought a warm coat. It wasn't expensive, only twenty pounds. And you? What did you do?
A: Well, on Saturday the weather was bad. It was cloudy and cold, so I stayed home. I cooked dinner and watched a film.
B: I love watching films at home. What about Sunday?
A: On Sunday it was sunny, so I played football in the park with my friends. But now I feel really tired, and I have got a headache.
B: Oh no. You should drink some water and rest. You shouldn't go out today.
A: You are right. I think it's going to rain later too.
B: Yes, take your umbrella! Get some rest, Tom.
A: Thanks, Mia. See you tomorrow!

comprehension.a: Because the weather was bad — cloudy and cold.

comprehension.q: What did Tom do on Sunday?
comprehension.a: He played football in the park with his friends.

comprehension.q: How does Tom feel now, and what does Mia say he should do?
comprehension.a: He feels tired and has a headache; Mia says he should drink water and rest.

targetSounds: -ed 词尾三种读音：清音后读 /t/（cooked, watched, washed）；浊音/元音后读 /d/（played, stayed, enjoyed）；t/d 后读 /ɪd/（visited, wanted, needed）
was/were 的弱读：在句中读作 /wəz/、/wə/，不重读，例如 It was nice → /ɪt wəz naɪs/
to 的弱读 /tə/：going to → /ˈɡəʊɪŋ tə/，口语中常说 gonna（今天先只做弱读）
and 的弱读 /ən/：fish and chips → /fɪʃ ən tʃɪps/
