speaking.speakingTask: Record yourself for 30-60 seconds: talk about YOUR last weekend. Say what you did (use went, bought, played, watched, cooked), what the weather was like, and one thing you enjoyed. Then give a friend one piece of health advice using 'You should...'.

reading.title: My Busy Weekend
reading.passage:
Last weekend was really busy for me. On Saturday morning, the weather was cloudy, so I went shopping with my friend Lily. I bought a cheap umbrella and some fruit. The umbrella was only three pounds! I love shopping with Lily because she is very funny.

In the afternoon, we cooked lunch together. We had noodles and vegetables. It was delicious. After lunch, we watched a film at home. My favorite hobby is watching films, so I enjoyed it a lot.

On Sunday, it was sunny and warm. I played football in the park with my brother. We played for two hours! In the evening, I felt very tired and I had a small headache. My mother said, "You should drink some water and rest." So I went to bed early. It was a good weekend.

comprehension.q: What did the writer buy on Saturday?
comprehension.a: A cheap umbrella (three pounds) and some fruit.

comprehension.q: Why does the writer like shopping with Lily?
comprehension.a: Because Lily is very funny.

comprehension.q: What did they do after lunch?
comprehension.a: They watched a film at home.

comprehension.q: What was the weather like on Sunday?
comprehension.a: It was sunny and warm.

comprehension.q: What advice did the mother give?
comprehension.a: She said the writer should drink some water and rest.

writing.prompt: Write a short diary (5-7 sentences) about your last weekend. Use past simple verbs (went, bought, played, cooked, watched), talk about the weather, and mention one hobby you enjoy. End with one 'should' sentence.
usefulPhrases: I went / bought / played / cooked / watched ...
writing.modelAnswer: Last weekend was nice. On Saturday the weather was cloudy, so I stayed home and cooked lunch with my family. We had chicken and rice. In the afternoon, I watched a film because watching films is my favorite hobby. On Sunday it was sunny, so I went to the park and played football with my friends. In the evening I felt tired. Next time I should rest more and drink more water.
selfCheck: 我的过去式动词用对了吗？（went, bought, played 等，规则动词记得加 -ed）
我提到天气了吗？（It was sunny / cloudy / cold）
我写了一个爱好并用了 -ing 吗？（I enjoy watching films）
我用了一句 should 吗？
句子之间有用 and / so / because 连接吗？

reviewFocus: 今天重点回炉第9-15天：(1) Day 12-13 一般过去时——用 went/saw/had/bought 和规则动词 -ed 复述周末，本课对话与阅读已大量复现；(2) Day 9 爱好表达 like/love/enjoy + -ing（favourite hobby, enjoy watching）；(3) Day 10 购物与数量 How much/many、expensive/cheap、价格 pounds；(4) Day 14 天气与 be going to（cloudy, sunny, It's going to rain, umbrella）；(5) Day 15 健康建议 should/shouldn't、have got a headache、tired、rest。发音复习 Day 12 的 -ed 三种词尾 /t/,/d/,/ɪd/ 和 Day 13 的 was/were 弱读。建议把第12-15天的生词卡再快速过一遍，并大声朗读本课 shadowing 句子。
dailyTip_zh: 复习日不是"重看一遍"，而是"主动回忆"。合上笔记，先试着自己说出上周末做了什么、用到哪些过去式动词，卡住了再翻笔记——这种"先想不起来再查"的过程，记得最牢。每天坚持大声跟读 shadowing，把弱读和 -ed 词尾练成肌肉记忆。

title_zh: 工作与学校生活
goals: 能说出常见的工作和学校相关词汇（老师、办公室、会议、作业等）
能区分并使用现在进行时（正在做）和一般现在时（经常做）
能用缩写 I'm / he's / she's 自然地介绍别人此刻在做什么
能问答 'What do you do?' 和 'What are you doing now?' 两种不同的问题

grammarNote.point_en: Present continuous vs present simple
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 一般现在时（present simple）表示经常性、习惯性的事：I work in an office.（我在办公室工作，这是我的日常）。现在进行时（present continuous = am/is/are + 动词-ing）表示此刻正在发生的事：I'm working now.（我现在正在工作）。判断信号词：every day, usually, always, often → 用一般现在时；now, right now, at the moment, today, Look! → 用现在进行时。口语中主语和 be 动词常缩写：I am → I'm，he is → he's，she is → she's，they are → they're。

examples.en: She teaches English. Right now she's teaching a class.
examples.zh: 她教英语。此刻她正在上一节课。

examples.en: I usually start work at nine, but today I'm starting late.
examples.zh: 我通常九点开始工作，但今天我开始得晚。

examples.en: He works in a shop. He's helping a customer at the moment.
examples.zh: 他在商店工作。他此刻正在帮一位顾客。

examples.en: We study every evening. Look, we're studying together now.
examples.zh: 我们每天晚上学习。看，我们现在正在一起学习。

vocabulary.example_en: I work in a small office.
vocabulary.example_zh: 我在一个小办公室工作。

vocabulary.example_zh: 我的办公室在车站附近。

vocabulary.example_en: We have a meeting at ten.

vocabulary.example_zh: 我现在正在写一封邮件。

vocabulary.example_en: He works on a computer all day.
We learn new words every day.
We have a short break at noon.
vocabulary.example_zh: 我们中午有个短暂的休息。

vocabulary.example_en: My books are on the desk.
We have an exam next week.

listening.title: A Busy Morning (一个忙碌的早晨)
listening.script:
A: Hi, Mia! You look busy. What are you doing?
B: Hi, Tom! I'm writing an email to my boss. We have a big meeting today.
A: A meeting? What time does it start?
B: It usually starts at ten, but today it starts at nine. So I'm working fast now!
A: I see. And where's Anna? She's your colleague, right?
B: Yes. She's in the office. She's making coffee for everyone.
A: And what do you do here, exactly?
B: I write reports and answer emails. I work with computers every day.
A: That sounds good. Look, your boss is coming!
B: Oh no! He's walking to my desk right now. I need to finish this email!
A: Good luck, Mia. I usually finish work at five. Do you finish at five too?
B: No, today I finish late. We're very busy this week!

It usually ____ at ten, but today it starts at nine.

I work with ____ every day.

comprehension.a: She's writing an email to her boss.

comprehension.a: It starts at nine (not ten).

comprehension.a: She's making coffee for everyone.

targetSounds: 缩写 I'm /aɪm/：把 I am 快速连读成一个音，不要读成两个分开的词
缩写 he's /hiːz/ 和 she's /ʃiːz/：结尾是 /z/ 浊音，像蜜蜂的嗡嗡声，不要读成 /s/
句子节奏（rhythm）：实词（work, boss, now）读重且长，虚词（am, is, a, the）读轻且短，形成强弱强弱的节奏

shadowing.text: We're very busy this week.

shadowing.text: I usually finish at five.

speaking.speakingTask: 录下你自己：先用一般现在时说你（或你朋友）平常的工作/学习（What do you do?），再用现在进行时说你此刻正在做什么（What are you doing now?）。例如：'I'm a student. I study English every day. Right now I'm doing my homework.'

reading.title: Ben's Working Day (本的工作日)
reading.passage:
Ben works in a big office in the city. He is a teacher, but he also helps in the school office. Every morning he starts work at eight. First he reads his emails, then he answers them on his computer. He usually has a meeting with his boss at ten.

Ben likes his job. He works with nice colleagues, and they often have lunch together. In the afternoon, he teaches two English classes. The students are young, and they learn new words every day.

Today is a busy day. Right now Ben is not teaching. He's sitting at his desk, and he's writing a report for his boss. His colleague Ann is helping him. "This report is difficult," Ben says, "but we're finishing it together!" After work, Ben usually goes home at five. But today he's finishing late.

comprehension.q: What does Ben do every morning at eight?
comprehension.a: He starts work and reads his emails.

comprehension.q: What is Ben doing right now?
comprehension.a: He's sitting at his desk and writing a report for his boss.

comprehension.q: Who is helping Ben with the report?
comprehension.a: His colleague Ann is helping him.

comprehension.q: Does Ben go home at five today? Why or why not?
comprehension.a: No. Today he's finishing late because it is a busy day.

writing.prompt: 写 5-7 句话描述你的工作日或学校生活。用一般现在时说你平常做的事（例如上班/上学时间、常做的工作），再用现在进行时说你此刻正在做的一件事。
usefulPhrases: I usually start at ... and finish at ...
writing.modelAnswer: I study at a language school in my city. Every day I start at nine and finish at four. I usually read, write, and speak English with my classmates. My teacher is very kind, and we learn new words together. Right now I'm sitting at my desk, and I'm writing about my day. At the moment my friend is helping me. I'm a little busy, but I'm happy!
selfCheck: 习惯性的事我用了一般现在时吗（动词加 -s 了吗，如 he works）？
此刻正在做的事我用了 am/is/are + 动词-ing 吗？
我正确使用了缩写吗（I'm, he's, she's）？
我用到了至少 3 个今天的新单词吗？
每个句子都有主语和动词吗？

reviewFocus: 复习第 5 天的日常作息与频率副词（always/usually/often/every day），把它们和今天的一般现在时结合起来说日常工作/学习；复习第 12-13 天的过去时（regular -ed 和 went/saw/had），用来对比"昨天做了什么" vs "现在正在做什么"；复习第 15 天的 should/shouldn't，说说工作或学习时的建议（例如 You should finish your homework first）。把这些旧词重新用在今天的口语任务里，避免遗忘。
dailyTip_zh: 区分这两个时态最快的方法是找"信号词"：看到 now, right now, at the moment, Look! 就用"正在做"（be + -ing）；看到 every day, usually, always 就用"经常做"（一般现在时）。今天练习时，先大声读语法例句里的对比句，感受同一个动词在两种时态下的不同，再用自己的生活造句。每天 5 分钟影子跟读缩写 I'm/he's/she's，你的口语会更地道流畅。

title_zh: 出行与交通：坐什么去、几点到
goals: 能用 by + 交通工具 说自己怎么去某地（by bus / by train / on foot）
能用时间与出行介词 at / on / in / from ... to 谈行程时刻

grammarNote.point_en: Prepositions of time & travel + 'by + transport'
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 1) 交通方式用 by + 交通工具（不加 a/the）：by bus, by train, by car, by plane。但"步行"是固定说法 on foot。2) 时间介词：at 用于具体时刻（at 7 o'clock, at noon）；on 用于星期/日期（on Monday, on July 1st）；in 用于较长时段（in the morning, in July）。3) 行程用 from ... to ...（from Beijing to Shanghai）。4) 到达用 arrive at（小地方/车站）或 arrive in（城市/国家）。

listening.title: At the Train Station（在火车站）
listening.script:
A: Good morning. Can I help you?
B: Yes, please. I want to go to York. How much is a ticket?
A: A single ticket is twenty pounds. A return is thirty-five.
B: I'll take a return, please. What time does the next train leave?
A: It leaves at nine forty, from platform two.
B: Nine forty... and what time does it arrive in York?
A: It arrives at eleven fifteen. So the trip is about one and a half hours.
B: Great. Do I need to change trains?
A: No, it's a direct train. You don't get off until York.
B: Perfect. Here is my money. Thank you.
A: Thank you. Platform two is over there, on the left. The train is a little late today, so please wait. Have a good trip!
B: Thank you very much. Goodbye.

speaking.speakingTask: 录一段 30 秒的话，说说你今天怎么来上班/上学：用 by + 交通工具 和时间介词，例如 "I go to work by bus. I leave home at seven thirty and I arrive at eight." 试着加入 get on / get off。

reading.title: My Trip to the City（我进城的一天）
reading.passage:
Every Saturday I travel to the city. I don't have a car, so I go by bus and train. First, I take the bus at eight o'clock in the morning. The bus stop is near my home, so I walk there on foot. It takes ten minutes.

Then I get off at the big station and buy a train ticket. A return ticket is not expensive. I get on the train and find a good seat by the window. The train leaves at half past eight and arrives in the city at nine fifteen.

In the city, I meet my friend Lin. We have lunch and go shopping. There are a lot of people on Saturday! In the evening, I catch the last train home. I don't want to miss it, so I am always early. I love my little trip to the city.

comprehension.q: How does the writer travel to the city?
comprehension.a: By bus and train.

comprehension.q: How does the writer get to the bus stop?
comprehension.a: On foot. He/She walks there in ten minutes.

comprehension.q: What time does the train arrive in the city?
comprehension.a: At nine fifteen.

comprehension.q: What does the writer do in the city?
comprehension.a: He/She meets a friend, has lunch, and goes shopping.

comprehension.q: Why is the writer always early in the evening?
comprehension.a: Because he/she doesn't want to miss the last train.

I get on / get off at ...

It goes from my town to the beach in one hour, so I arrive at eight thirty. At the beach I swim and eat ice cream with my family. In the evening I catch the train home. It is a lovely trip!

我用了 from ... to ... 描述行程吗？
动词 leave / arrive / get on / get off 用对了吗？

reviewFocus: 复习第 17 天的现在进行时与一般现在时对比（例如 "The train leaves at eight" 是时刻表用一般现在时；"I am waiting for the bus" 是此刻正在进行），今天的对话里两者都出现了。复习第 14 天的天气与 going to 预测（可说 "It's going to rain, so take a taxi"）。复习第 11 天的方向与位置介词（over there, on the left, near）和第 3 天的时间/数字读法（nine forty, eleven fifteen, half past eight）——今天买票、问月台会大量用到。把第 6 天点餐用语（I would like...）迁移到买票：I would like a return ticket。
dailyTip_zh: 连读和省音是"听不懂母语者"的最大原因之一。今天别只看单词，要"跟读到影子"：先放一句，暂停，立刻模仿语音语调（连 get off、pick up 的连读一起模仿）。每句跟读 3 遍，先慢后快。把手机录下自己的声音和原音对比，你会立刻发现自己在哪里"多停顿"了。坚持 10 分钟，耳朵和嘴一起进步。

title_zh: 我的未来计划
goals: 能用 be going to 谈论已经决定好的计划（如：I'm going to visit my family next week）
能用 will 表达临时决定、承诺和预测（如：I'll help you / It will rain tomorrow）
能听懂并说出 gonna / wanna 的自然口语连读
能就'周末打算做什么'进行一段 6-8 句的自然对话

grammarNote.point_en: be going to vs will
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 两者都谈未来，但用法不同。1) be going to (口语常读作 gonna)：说的是【已经决定好】的计划、打算，或【看到征兆】的预测。结构：主语 + am/is/are + going to + 动词原形。例：I'm going to buy a phone.（我已经打算买）；Look at those clouds—it's going to rain.（看到征兆）。2) will（缩写 'll）：用于【说话当下】才做的决定、承诺、提议，以及没有依据的【主观预测】。结构：主语 + will + 动词原形。例：I'll help you.（当场决定帮）；I think it will be fun.（主观预测）。小结：已定计划用 going to，临时决定/承诺用 will。否定：am/is/are not going to；won't (= will not)。

examples.en: I'm going to study English every day this month.
examples.zh: 这个月我打算每天学英语。（已定计划）

examples.en: Don't worry, I will help you with your bags.
examples.zh: 别担心，我来帮你拿包。（当场决定/提议）

examples.en: She's going to visit her parents next weekend.
examples.zh: 她打算下周末去看父母。（已定计划）

examples.en: It's cold outside. I think it will snow tonight.
examples.zh: 外面很冷，我觉得今晚会下雪。（主观预测）

examples.en: We aren't going to take the bus; we'll walk.
examples.zh: 我们不打算坐公交，我们要走路。（否定计划 + 临时决定）

listening.title: What Are You Going to Do This Weekend?
listening.script:
A: Hi, Mei! Are you free this weekend?
B: Hi, Tom! On Saturday I'm going to visit my grandmother. What about you?
A: Nice! I'm going to travel to the mountains. I'm so happy.
B: Wow, that sounds great! Are you going to go by car?
A: No, we're going to take the train. It's cheaper.
B: Good idea. What are you going to do on Sunday?
A: I'm not sure. Maybe I'll just stay home and read.
B: Well, I'm going to have a small party on Sunday night. Do you want to come?
A: A party? Yes! I'll come. What time?
B: About seven o'clock. I promise it will be fun.
A: I'm sure it will! Can I bring some food?
B: Yes, please. That will be great. See you on Sunday!
A: See you! I'm going to save my energy for the party!

targetSounds: /w/：双唇拢圆再快速张开，声带振动。练 will, we, want, weekend, wait, wow。别读成 /v/（上齿咬下唇）。
gonna：going to 在快速口语中读作 /ˈɡənə/，如 'I'm gonna go' = I'm going to go。注意：只用于口语，写作仍写 going to。
wanna：want to 读作 /ˈwɒnə/，如 'I wanna come' = I want to come。同样只用于口语。

speaking.speakingTask: 录一段 3-4 句话，用 be going to 说两件你这周末已经决定要做的事，再用 will 说一件你觉得可能会发生的事。例如：This weekend I'm going to clean my room and visit my friend. Maybe it will rain, so I'll take an umbrella.

reading.title: Anna's Big Plans
reading.passage:
Anna has some big plans for the future. Next month, she's going to start a new job in a small shop. She's very happy about it. She's also going to save money every week because she wants to travel.

Next year, Anna is going to visit three countries with her best friend. They're going to take the train and stay in cheap hotels. "It's going to be so much fun," Anna says.

Anna is not sure about everything. "Maybe I will learn a new language," she says. "And maybe I will move to a new city one day. I'm not sure yet, but I hope my future will be good."

Tonight, Anna is going to call her friend and talk about their trip. "I promise it will be a great year," she says with a big smile.

comprehension.a: She's going to start a new job in a small shop.

comprehension.a: Because she wants to travel.

comprehension.q: How are Anna and her friend going to travel next year?
comprehension.a: They're going to take the train and stay in cheap hotels.

comprehension.a: She might learn a new language and might move to a new city one day.

comprehension.a: She's going to call her friend and talk about their trip.

Maybe I will ... / I think it will ...
I hope my future will be ...
writing.modelAnswer: I have some plans for the future. Next month, I'm going to start an English class. I'm also going to save money every week. Next year, I'm going to travel to Japan with my family. We're going to take the train and visit many old towns. Maybe I will learn to cook Japanese food too. I'm not sure about everything, but I hope my future will be happy and busy. I promise I will study hard!

reviewFocus: 今日间隔复习（抗遗忘）：1) Day 18 出行词汇 by train / by car / take the bus 和连读 get off——今天对话与阅读里多次自然复现，请再读出声。2) Day 14 天气预测的 going to（It's going to rain）与今天语法呼应，对比 will 的主观预测。3) Day 13 过去时不规则动词 went/saw/had——用一句话对比：Last weekend I went to the park; next weekend I'm going to visit my friend（过去 vs 将来）。4) Day 3 时间表达 at seven o'clock、Day 9 like/want + 动词，今天 What time? 和 Do you want to come? 都在复用。SM-2 词卡今天到期的旧词请优先过一遍再学新词。
dailyTip_zh: 口语连读是"说得像母语者"的关键。gonna 和 wanna 不是偷懒，而是英语真实的自然节奏。今天跟读时，先慢速把每个词读准，再逐渐加速，让 going to 自然滑成 gonna。录音后对比原句，重点听自己的 /w/ 有没有拢圆双唇（不要变成 /v/）。每天坚持 5 分钟影子跟读，一个月后你会明显感到嘴巴"跟得上"了。

title_en: On the Phone: Making Calls and Appointments
title_zh: 打电话与预约
goals: 能用 Can I ...? 和 Could you ...? 提出礼貌的请求（如要求转接、留言）
能在电话里打招呼、说明来意、约时间和确认约会
能在电话里正确地拼读自己的名字、电话号码和电子邮箱
能听懂并使用正确的疑问句升降调

grammarNote.point_en: Polite requests: Can I ...? / Could you ...? / I'd like to ...
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 打电话时我们常用礼貌的请求语。Can I ...? 用来请求“我可以……吗”，比较随意；Could you ...? 用来请求别人“你能……吗”，比 Can you 更礼貌。回答请求常说 Sure. / Of course. / One moment, please. 另外 I'd like to ... (= I would like to) 表示“我想要……”，比 I want 更客气。注意：Can/Could 后面直接跟动词原形，不加 to（Could you call me back? 不是 Could you to call）。

examples.en: Can I speak to Mr. Green, please?
examples.zh: 我可以和 Green 先生通话吗？

examples.en: Could you say that again, please?

listening.title: A Call to the Dentist / 给牙医诊所打电话
listening.script:
A: Good morning, Green Street Clinic. How can I help you?
B: Hello. Can I make an appointment, please?
A: Sure. Can I have your name, please?
B: Yes. My name is Anna Lee.
A: Could you spell your last name for me?
B: Of course. L - E - E. Lee.
A: Thank you. What is the problem?
B: I have a bad tooth. It hurts a lot.
A: I'm sorry. Are you free on Wednesday morning?
B: Wednesday is not good for me. Could you find a time on Thursday?
A: Let me check. Yes, Thursday at ten o'clock is available.
B: Ten o'clock is great. Thank you.
A: Could you give me your phone number, please?
B: Sure. It's 6 - 4 - 2 - 9 - 1 - 0.
A: Let me confirm. Thursday at ten. See you then, Anna.
B: Thank you. Goodbye.

reading.title: Ben's Busy Phone Morning / Ben 忙碌的电话早晨
reading.passage:
Ben works at a small hotel. In the morning, the phone rings a lot. First, a woman calls. "Can I book a room for Friday?" she asks. "Sure," Ben says. "Could you spell your name, please?" She says, "S - M - I - T - H, Smith." Ben writes it down.

Then another call comes. A man wants to speak to the manager, but the manager is busy. "I'm sorry, she is not available now," Ben says. "Can I take a message?" The man says, "Yes. Could you ask her to call me back? My number is 7 - 3 - 1 - 2."

Later, a third caller has the wrong number. "Sorry, this is a hotel," Ben says with a smile. He is polite to every caller. At twelve o'clock, Ben is tired but happy. It is a busy phone morning!

glossary.meaning_zh: （电话）响（ring 的第三人称单数）

dailyTip_zh: 电话里听不清很正常，别慌！记住三句“救命话”：Could you say that again? / Could you speak more slowly? / Could you spell that? 今天大声朗读 shadowing 句子至少 3 遍，特别注意问句的升调（↗）和降调（↘）。可以录下自己的声音，和 TTS 朗读对比语调，坚持每天开口 20 分钟，一个月后你会明显更自信。

title_zh: 你觉得怎么样？表达观点与感受
goals: 能用 I think... 说出自己的看法，并用 because 给出原因
能用 I agree / I don't agree 表示同意或不同意别人
能用 10 个以上表示感受的形容词描述心情（happy, tired, bored, worried 等）
能通过重读关键词（stress for emphasis）让语气更自然、更有感情

grammarNote.point_en: I think / I agree; giving reasons with because; adjectives of feeling
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 表达观点最常用 'I think + 句子'，意思是'我觉得/我认为'。想给原因时用 'because + 句子'（因为……）。同意别人说 'I agree'，不同意说 'I don't agree' 或 'I'm not sure'。表示感受时用 be 动词 + 形容词：'I am tired.'（我累了）、'She is happy.'（她很开心）。注意：形容词不加 s，也不用变复数。这些都是第3阶段的重点句型，能让你在真实对话里表达想法。

listening.title: A Coffee, a Movie, and Two Opinions
listening.script:
A: Hi, Mei! How do you feel today? You look happy.
B: I am happy, because I have a free afternoon. Do you want to see a movie?
A: Maybe. What movie do you think is good?
B: I think the new action movie is great. It is really exciting.
A: Hmm, I'm not sure. I saw it last week, and I was a little bored.
B: Bored? Really? Why?
A: Because it is too long, and the story is not interesting. I think the ending is wrong.
B: Okay, I agree the ending is strange. But the music is good.
A: Yes, you are right about the music. I love the music.
B: So, what do you want to do?
A: Let's get a coffee first. I am a little tired.
B: Good idea! I am tired too. Coffee, and then we can talk about the movie.
A: Great. I feel excited now. Coffee makes me happy!
B: Me too. Let's go.

speaking.speakingTask: 用手机录一段 30 秒的话，说说你喜欢或不喜欢的一部电影或一首歌。至少用一次 'I think...'、一次 'because'，和两个表示感受的形容词（例如 happy, bored, excited）。

reading.title: Sam and Lily Talk About Work
reading.passage:
Sam and Lily work in the same office. On Monday, they talk about their jobs.
"How do you feel about your work?" Lily asks.
"I think my job is interesting," Sam says. "I like it because I meet many people. But some days are very busy, and I feel tired."
Lily agrees. "I feel tired too. But I am happy, because my boss is kind."
"You are lucky," Sam says. "My boss is not always happy. Sometimes I am a little nervous at work."
Lily thinks for a moment. "Maybe you can talk to him. I think that is a good idea."
"Maybe you are right," Sam says. "Thank you. I feel better now."
They both smile. It is nice to have a friend at work. Now they feel ready for a busy day.

glossary.meaning_zh: 更好（good 的比较级，感觉好些）

comprehension.q: Why does Sam like his job?
comprehension.a: Because he meets many people. He thinks his job is interesting.

comprehension.q: Why is Lily happy at work?
comprehension.a: Because her boss is kind.

comprehension.q: How does Sam sometimes feel at work, and why?
comprehension.a: He sometimes feels nervous because his boss is not always happy.

comprehension.q: What does Lily think Sam should do?
comprehension.a: She thinks Sam can talk to his boss. Sam says maybe she is right.

writing.prompt: 写 4-6 个句子，说说你对一件事的看法和感受（例如你的工作、一部电影、一个城市或一种食物）。用 'I think...' 说观点，用 'because' 给原因，并用两三个表示感受的形容词。
usefulPhrases: I feel happy / tired / excited when ...
I am not sure, but maybe ...
writing.modelAnswer: I think my city is a good place to live. I like it because the food is cheap and the people are kind. In the morning, I feel happy because the streets are quiet. But some days the buses are very busy, and I feel tired. I don't agree that big cities are always better. Maybe a small city is nice too. This is my opinion.
selfCheck: 我用了至少一次 'I think...' 吗？
我用 'because' 给出了原因吗？
我用了至少两个表示感受的形容词吗（如 happy, tired）？
形容词有没有多加 s？（应该不加）
每个句子都有 be 动词或主要动词吗？

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 9（like/love/hate + -ing 表达喜好）和 Day 17（present continuous vs present simple 描述工作），把今天的 I think.../because 和它们连起来说，例如 'I think I like my job because I am learning new things.'。同时复习 Day 20 的礼貌请求 Can I...? / Could you...?，在今天的对话里自然用上（如点咖啡）。口头快速回顾 Day 5 日常作息词汇（work, morning, busy）和 Day 13 过去式不规则动词 saw/went/had，本课听力和阅读里都出现了这些词。
dailyTip_zh: 表达感受时，别只说 'good' 或 'bad'。今天学的形容词（tired, bored, worried, excited）能让你的英语更真实、更有人味。练习时故意重读那个感受词——'I am SO tired!'——你会发现语气一下子就自然了。每天挑 3 个感受词，用它们描述你当下的心情，坚持一周，它们就会变成你的口头语。

title_zh: 更大、更好、最好：比较事物
goals: 能用比较级 (bigger, faster, more expensive) 比较两个事物
能用最高级 (the biggest, the best) 说出一组中最突出的一个
能自然地读出 than /ðən/ 的弱读和 -er 结尾
能在购物、旅行、日常对话中做出简单的选择和比较

grammarNote.point_en: Comparatives & Superlatives (bigger / the biggest, more useful / the most useful)
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 比较两样东西用【比较级】：短形容词加 -er，后面用 than。例如 cheap → cheaper than。长形容词(两个以上音节)前面加 more，例如 expensive → more expensive than。三样或更多里挑最突出的用【最高级】：短形容词加 the ...-est，长形容词用 the most ...。拼写要点：big → bigger（双写子音），easy → easier（y 变 i），nice → nicer（直接加 -r）。不规则变化要记牢：good → better → the best；bad → worse → the worst。注意 than 在句中要弱读成 /ðən/，几乎和后面的词连在一起。

listening.title: Choosing a New Phone
listening.script:
A: Look, I want to buy a new phone. Can you help me compare these two?
B: Sure. This black one is cheaper. It's two hundred dollars.
A: And the white one?
B: The white one is more expensive. It's three hundred dollars, but the quality is better.
A: Hmm. Is the white phone faster?
B: Yes, it's faster than the black one. And the screen is bigger too.
A: Bigger is good. I like a big screen. But three hundred dollars is a lot.
B: I know. The black phone is not bad. It's smaller and slower, but it's cheaper.
A: For me, a good camera is more important than the price. Which camera is better?
B: The white phone has the best camera in the shop.
A: Then I think the white one is the best choice for me. It's more expensive, but it's worth it.
B: Good idea. A better phone can make your life easier.
A: Thank you! You are the best shopping friend!

targetSounds: than /ðən/：这是弱读。舌尖轻触上齿背发 /ð/，元音是模糊的 /ə/，不要读成重音的 'than'。把它和前面的词连起来读，例如 bigger than → /ˈbɪɡə ðən/，几乎像一个词。
-er 结尾 /ə/：cheaper, bigger, faster 的 -er 是轻轻的 schwa /ə/，不要卷舌读成美式的强 /r/，也不要读成 'errr'。舌头放松，声音变弱。
double letters 双写：bigger, hotter 中间的子音要短促清晰，注意不是长音，只是拼写双写。

shadowing.text: This one is cheaper than that one.
shadowing.tip: cheaper than 连读，than 弱读成 /ðən/，重音落在 cheaper 上。

speaking.speakingTask: Compare two things in your life (two phones, two cities, two restaurants, or two seasons). Record 3-4 sentences using a comparative (bigger/cheaper/more expensive/better) and one superlative (the best / the most ...). Example: 'My old phone was slower. My new phone is faster and better. It is the best phone I have.'

reading.title: Two Coffee Shops
reading.passage:
There are two coffee shops on my street. The first one is called Sun Cafe. The second one is called Green Cup. I go to both, but they are very different.

Sun Cafe is bigger. It has more tables and more seats. The coffee is cheaper too. A cup of coffee is only two dollars. But the coffee is not very good, and the shop is often noisy.

Green Cup is smaller. It has only six tables. The coffee is more expensive; one cup is four dollars. But the quality is much better, and the shop is quieter. The people who work there are friendly.

Which one is the best? For me, Green Cup is the best. Good coffee is more important to me than a low price. My friend likes Sun Cafe more, because it is cheaper. Different people like different things!

glossary.meaning_zh: 更安静的（quiet 的比较级）

comprehension.q: Which coffee shop is bigger?
comprehension.a: Sun Cafe is bigger.

comprehension.q: Which shop has cheaper coffee?
comprehension.a: Sun Cafe has cheaper coffee (two dollars a cup).

comprehension.q: Why does the writer like Green Cup best?
comprehension.a: Because the coffee quality is better, and good coffee is more important to the writer than a low price.

comprehension.q: Why does the writer's friend like Sun Cafe more?
comprehension.a: Because it is cheaper.

writing.prompt: Compare two shops, two restaurants, or two places you know. Write about 5-7 sentences. Say which one is bigger/smaller, cheaper/more expensive, and which one is the best for you and why.
usefulPhrases: For me, ... is the best because ...
writing.modelAnswer: There are two supermarkets near my home. The first one is bigger and cheaper. It has more food and lower prices. The second one is smaller and more expensive, but the quality is better and it is quieter. For me, the second one is the best, because good quality is more important than a low price. My mother likes the first one more, because it is cheaper. Different people like different things.
selfCheck: 我用了至少两个比较级 (如 bigger, cheaper, more expensive) 吗？
我用了至少一个最高级 (the best / the most ...) 吗？
我在比较级后面正确使用了 than 吗？
短形容词我加了 -er，长形容词我用了 more 吗？
good/bad 我用了 better/best 和 worse/worst 而不是 gooder 吗？

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 21 的观点表达：用 I think / because 来解释你的比较选择 (例如 "I think Green Cup is the best because the coffee is better")。复习 Day 10 购物用语 (How much...? this/that/these/those) 和价格，融入今天的手机、咖啡比较对话。复习 Day 14 天气形容词 (hot, cold, cloudy) 来练习 hotter/colder。复习 Day 6 食物和 Day 7 there is/there are ("There are two coffee shops...")。用 SRS 抽查 Day 17-20 的核心词。
dailyTip_zh: 学比较级最好的方法是"随手比较"：走在路上时，用英语小声对比你看到的两样东西——"That car is bigger. This one is cheaper. The bus is faster than the bike."每天做 20 次这样的迷你比较，than /ðən/ 的弱读和 -er 结尾很快就会变成你的肌肉记忆，比死记规则有效得多。

title_en: What Were You Doing? Telling a Story
title_zh: 你当时在做什么？讲一个故事
goals: 能用过去进行时 (was/were + doing) 描述过去某个时刻正在进行的动作
能用 when 和 while 把"背景"和"突然发生的事"连在一起讲一个小故事
能听懂一段简单的叙事，抓住时间线和关键动作
能自己口头讲出一个 4-6 句的小故事，was/were 用弱读、节奏自然

grammarNote.point_en: Past continuous vs past simple; when / while
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 过去进行时表示"过去某个时刻正在进行、还没结束的动作"，结构是 was/were + 动词-ing（I/he/she/it 用 was，you/we/they 用 was 的复数形式 were）。过去一般时 (past simple, 如 rained, saw, called) 表示"发生了并结束了的短动作"。讲故事时常常两个一起用：一个长的背景动作正在进行，另一个短动作突然打断它。连接词规律：while 后面通常跟"正在进行的长动作"(while I was cooking)，when 后面通常跟"突然发生的短动作"(when the phone rang)。例如 While I was cooking, the phone rang. = I was cooking when the phone rang. 两句意思一样。注意 was/were 在句中读得很轻(弱读)，重音落在实义动词上。

examples.en: I was reading a book when my friend called.

examples.en: While she was cooking, the baby was sleeping.
examples.zh: 她做饭的时候，宝宝正在睡觉。（两个都是背景动作）

examples.en: It was raining when we left the house.
examples.zh: 我们离开家的时候正在下雨。

examples.en: They were waiting at the station when the train arrived.
examples.zh: 火车到站的时候，他们正在站台等着。

vocabulary.example_zh: 我给你讲个有趣的故事。

我听到一个奇怪的声音。

I dropped my phone on the floor.
The cup broke into small pieces.
The little boy started to cry.
She fell and hurt her arm.
We were running to catch the train.
vocabulary.example_zh: 我们当时在跑着赶火车。

vocabulary.example_en: I was looking for my keys.
He lost his wallet on the bus.
vocabulary.example_zh: 他把钱包丢在公交车上了。
后来，她找到了她的戒指。

vocabulary.example_en: I was afraid of the dark.
We were very lucky that day.

vocabulary.meaning_zh: 不管怎样（讲故事的过渡词）
vocabulary.example_en: Anyway, we finished the trip safely.
vocabulary.example_zh: 不管怎样，我们平安结束了旅程。
然后我意识到了我的错误。

listening.title: A Strange Night: What Were We Doing?
listening.script:
A: You look tired today. What happened last night?
B: Oh, it's a strange story. At about eleven, I was sleeping in my room.
A: Sleeping? So early? Okay, go on.
B: While I was sleeping, I suddenly heard a loud noise outside.
A: A noise? What was it?
B: I didn't know! It was very dark, and I was a little afraid. So I got up and looked out the window.
A: And? What did you see?
B: My neighbor was standing in the garden. He was looking for his cat.
A: His cat? At eleven at night?
B: Yes! The cat was sitting in a tree, and it was crying. While he was calling the cat, it suddenly fell down.
A: Oh no! Did the cat get hurt?
B: No, the cat was lucky. It landed on some soft grass and ran away. We were both laughing.
A: Ha! So you didn't sleep well.
B: No. But anyway, the cat is fine. Finally, I went back to bed at one o'clock.

dictation.sentence: While I was ____, I suddenly heard a loud noise outside.
It was very ____, and I was a little afraid.
My neighbor was ____ in the garden.
While he was calling the cat, it suddenly ____ down.
The cat was ____. It landed on some soft grass.
____, I went back to bed at one o'clock.

comprehension.q: What was B doing at about eleven o'clock?
comprehension.a: B was sleeping in the/his room.

comprehension.q: Why was the neighbor outside in the garden?
comprehension.a: He was looking for his cat.

comprehension.q: What happened while the neighbor was calling the cat?
comprehension.a: The cat suddenly fell down (from the tree).

comprehension.q: Did the cat get hurt?
comprehension.a: No. It was lucky and landed on soft grass, then ran away.

comprehension.q: What time did B finally go back to bed?
comprehension.a: At one o'clock.

targetSounds: was 弱读 /wəz/：在句中不重读时，was 读得又轻又快，元音变成 schwa /ə/，如 I was reading /aɪ wəz ˈriːdɪŋ/，重音在 reading 上。
were 弱读 /wər/：were 同样弱读，几乎和 -er 一样轻，如 We were waiting /wi wər ˈweɪtɪŋ/，重音在 waiting 上。
叙事节奏 (narrative rhythm)：讲故事时，实义动词 (sleeping, noise, fell, ran) 说得重而清楚，was/were/the/a 等虚词说得轻，快速带过，一组一组地说。
suddenly /ˈsʌdənli/：重音在第一个音节 SU-，中间的 d 后面很轻，不要读成三个一样重的音节。

shadowing.text: I was sleeping when I heard a noise.
shadowing.tip: was 弱读 /wəz/，重音放在 sleeping 和 noise 上。

shadowing.text: While I was sleeping, the phone rang.
shadowing.tip: while 后面接长动作；rang 读得清楚，是那个"突然发生"的短动作。

shadowing.text: We were waiting for the bus.
shadowing.tip: were 弱读 /wər/，were 和 for 都轻轻带过，重音在 waiting 和 bus。

shadowing.text: Suddenly, I heard a strange sound.
shadowing.tip: suddenly 重音在 SU-；strange 里的 /str/ 三个辅音连着读，不加多余元音。

shadowing.text: The cat was sitting in a tree.
shadowing.tip: was 弱读；sitting 的 -tt- 在美音里读成很快的 /ɾ/，像轻轻的 d。

shadowing.text: It suddenly fell down and ran away.
shadowing.tip: fell 和 ran 是两个短动作，读得干脆有力，节奏往前推。

shadowing.text: We were both laughing.
shadowing.tip: were 轻读；laughing 的 augh 读 /æf/，注意结尾 /f/ 的音。

shadowing.text: Anyway, I finally went back to bed.
shadowing.tip: anyway 和 finally 是讲故事的过渡词，说完稍微停一下，给听者反应时间。

shadowing.text: What were you doing at nine last night?
shadowing.tip: were you 连读、弱读，重音在 doing；这是常用的提问句型。

shadowing.text: I was cooking dinner when my friend arrived.
shadowing.tip: 两段一起说：was cooking 一组、when my friend arrived 一组，中间轻轻停顿。

speaking.speakingTask: 用手机录下一个 4-6 句的小故事：讲一件上周发生在你身上的事。至少用一次 was/were + doing（背景动作），一次过去一般时的短动作，以及 when 或 while。开头可以说 "Last week, something strange happened. I was ..."，结尾用 "Anyway, finally ..."。

reading.title: The Day I Lost My Bag
reading.passage:
Last Saturday, something strange happened to me. In the morning, it was raining, so I took the bus to the shopping center. While I was sitting on the bus, I was listening to music and looking out the window. I was very happy.

When the bus stopped, I got off quickly. But a few minutes later, I realized a big problem. I didn't have my bag! My phone, my keys, and my money were all in it.

I was afraid. I ran back to the bus stop, but the bus was already gone. While I was standing there, a woman came to me. She was holding my bag! "You dropped this on the bus," she said. "I found it under the seat."

I was so happy. I said thank you many times. I was very lucky that day. Anyway, now I always check my bag before I get off the bus!

glossary.meaning_zh: 走了，离开了（go 的过去分词）
拿着，握着（过去式 held / 现在分词 holding）

comprehension.q: How did the writer go to the shopping center?
comprehension.a: By bus (because it was raining).

comprehension.q: What was the writer doing while sitting on the bus?
comprehension.a: Listening to music and looking out the window.

comprehension.q: What problem did the writer realize after getting off?
comprehension.a: He/She didn't have the bag; the phone, keys, and money were all in it.

comprehension.q: Who found the bag, and where?
comprehension.a: A woman found it under the seat on the bus.

comprehension.q: What does the writer always do now?
comprehension.a: He/She always checks the bag before getting off the bus.

writing.prompt: 写一个短故事 (60-80 词)，讲一件过去发生的、有点意外或有趣的事。用过去进行时描述当时正在做的背景动作，用过去一般时描述突然发生的事，至少用一次 when 和一次 while。
usefulPhrases: I was a little afraid / surprised.
writing.modelAnswer: Last Sunday, something funny happened. In the afternoon, I was cooking dinner in the kitchen. While I was cooking, I was also talking on the phone with my friend. Suddenly, I heard a strange noise. When I turned around, I saw my cat on the table! It was eating my fish. I was surprised, but I started to laugh. Anyway, finally I made a new dinner, and the cat was very happy!
selfCheck: 我有没有用 was/were + 动词-ing 来描述背景动作？
我有没有用过去一般时 (如 heard, saw, started) 描述突然的短动作？
我有没有各用一次 when 和 while？
故事有没有清楚的开头、中间和结尾（如 Last..., Suddenly..., Anyway/Finally...）？
was 和 were 有没有和主语正确搭配 (I/he/she was, we/you/they were)？

reviewFocus: 复习 Day 12-13 的过去时：先快速朗读 10 个过去式动词，尤其不规则的 went / saw / had / ran / fell / found / lost / broke / heard，确保能脱口而出。再回顾 Day 13 的 was/were 弱读，把它接到今天的 was/were + doing 上。把 Day 21 的感受词 (happy, afraid, surprised, tired) 和 Day 14 的天气 (It was raining / cold / cloudy) 放进你今天讲的故事里作背景。最后用 Day 7 的地点介词 (in the garden, on the bus, under the seat) 描述故事发生的地点，做到旧词新用。
dailyTip_zh: 讲故事最好的练习法是"复述"：听完今天的听力后，先不看文字，试着用自己的话把这个"猫的故事"重讲一遍，能说几句是几句。忘词也没关系，先把时间线 (先…然后…突然…最后) 讲通顺。母语者讲故事也常用 anyway、finally、suddenly 这些小词来连接，多用它们，你的英语一下子就自然多了。

title_en: Would You Like to Come? Making Plans and Invitations
title_zh: 你想来吗？——制定计划与发出邀请
goals: 能用 Would you like to ...? 礼貌地邀请别人做某事
能用 Let's ... 和 How about ...? 提出建议
能接受或婉拒邀请（That sounds great. / Sorry, I can't.）
能和朋友约定时间和地点（When? Where? What time?）

grammarNote.point_en: Inviting and suggesting: Would you like to ...? / Let's ... / How about ...?
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 今天学三种发出邀请和提建议的常用说法。1) Would you like to + 动词原形...? 是最礼貌的邀请，意思是"你想不想……？"，回答常用 Yes, I'd love to. 或 Sorry, I can't. 注意 like 后面用动词原形（to go, to come），不是 -ing。2) Let's + 动词原形 = Let us 的缩写，意思是"我们（一起）……吧"，用来提出大家一起做的建议，如 Let's meet at six. 否定用 Let's not ...。3) How about + 名词 / 动词-ing? 用来提建议或提出时间地点，如 How about Saturday? / How about going to the park? 回答邀请时：接受说 That sounds great. / Sure! 婉拒说 Sorry, I'm busy. / Maybe next time. 这些句子都要配合礼貌的语调（句尾语调上扬显得友好）。

examples.en: Would you like to have dinner with us tonight?
examples.zh: 你今晚想和我们一起吃晚饭吗？

examples.en: Let's meet at the coffee shop at three.
examples.zh: 我们三点在咖啡店见吧。

examples.en: How about going to the movies on Saturday?

listening.title: An Invitation to a Birthday Party (生日派对的邀请)
listening.script:
A: Hi, Emma! Are you free this Saturday?
B: Hi, Tom! Yes, I think so. Why?
A: It's my birthday. Would you like to come to my party?
B: Oh, happy birthday! I'd love to come. Thank you for the invitation!
A: Great! The party starts at six. Let's meet at my house.
B: Sure. How about I bring a cake?
A: That sounds perfect! Lucy is coming too. Let's celebrate together.
B: Nice! Is Ben free? We can invite him over.
A: Good idea. I'll call him tonight. Maybe he can join us.
B: Do you have any plans for the food?
A: Yes, we're planning a small dinner. And after that, how about a movie?
B: A movie sounds fun! But I have an appointment at nine, so I can't stay late.
A: No problem. See you on Saturday at six!
B: Perfect. See you then. Thanks again!

____ meet at my house.
How ____ I bring a cake?
That ____ perfect!

comprehension.a: It is this Saturday, at six o'clock.

comprehension.a: She wants to bring a cake.

comprehension.q: Why can't Emma stay late?
comprehension.a: Because she has an appointment at nine.

comprehension.q: Who else is coming to the party?
comprehension.a: Lucy is coming, and they will invite Ben too.

targetSounds: 礼貌语调：Would you like to...? 句尾语调上扬（升调），听起来更友好、更客气
连读：Would you 连读成 /wʊdʒu/，like to 常读成 /laɪktə/
连读：How about 连读成 /haʊ.əˈbaʊt/，about it → /əˈbaʊtɪt/
That sounds 的 -t sounds 轻轻连在一起，读作 /ðætsaʊndz/

shadowing.tip: Would you 连读 /wʊdʒu/，句尾升调，听起来很客气

shadowing.text: How about Saturday?
shadowing.tip: How about 连读 /haʊəˈbaʊt/，重音在 -bout 和 Sa-

shadowing.tip: sounds great 之间轻轻停顿，great 语气上扬表示开心

shadowing.text: Are you free tonight?

shadowing.text: Perfect! See you then.
shadowing.tip: See you 连读 /siːju/，then 结尾降调表示确定

speaking.speakingTask: 想象你要邀请一位朋友周末一起做某件事（看电影、野餐或吃晚饭）。录下你自己：用 Would you like to ...? 发出邀请，用 Let's ... 约定时间和地点，最后用 See you then! 结束。说 3-4 句话。

reading.title: Making Plans for Sunday (计划周日)
reading.passage:
Anna wants to do something fun on Sunday. She is free all day, and the weather is nice. In the morning, she calls her friend Kate.

"Hi, Kate! Are you free on Sunday?" Anna asks. "Would you like to go to the park?"

"Yes, I'd love to!" Kate says. "How about a picnic? I can make some sandwiches."

"Great idea!" says Anna. "Let's invite Mia too. She loves the park."

They call Mia. Mia is a little busy, but she says, "Maybe I can come in the afternoon."

"Perfect," says Anna. "Let's meet at the park gate at eleven. After the picnic, how about a walk by the river?"

"That sounds lovely," says Kate.

On Sunday, the three friends meet at the park. They eat, they talk, and they walk together. It is a wonderful day. Making plans with friends is easy and fun!

comprehension.q: What does Anna want to do on Sunday?
comprehension.a: She wants to do something fun, like going to the park.

comprehension.q: What will Kate make for the picnic?
comprehension.a: She will make some sandwiches.

comprehension.q: When can Mia come?
comprehension.a: Maybe in the afternoon, because she is a little busy.

comprehension.q: Where and when do they meet?
comprehension.a: They meet at the park gate at eleven.

writing.prompt: 给朋友写一条短信（4-6句），邀请他/她这个周末一起做一件事。要用到 Would you like to ...? 发出邀请，用 Let's ... 或 How about ...? 约定时间和地点。
writing.modelAnswer: Hi Lily! Are you free this Saturday? Would you like to go to the cinema with me? There is a new movie, and I think it's fun. How about meeting at two o'clock? Let's meet at the cinema gate. After the movie, we can have dinner together. Please text me back. See you then!
selfCheck: 我用了 Would you like to ...? 来发出邀请吗？
我用了 Let's ... 或 How about ...? 来提建议吗？
我写清楚了时间和地点吗？
动词 like 后面用的是动词原形（to go），不是 going 吗？
句子结尾的标点和大小写都对吗？

reviewFocus: 复习第20天的礼貌请求（Can I ...? / Could you ...?）——把它们和今天的 Would you like to ...? 一起对比练习，都属于礼貌功能句。复习第19天的将来计划（be going to）：今天对话里出现了 "we're planning a small dinner" 和谈论周末计划，正好巩固 going to / plan 的用法。再复习第3天的时间表达（at six / at eleven / on Saturday）和第13天周末活动词汇（park, movie, walk），今天在约定时间地点时反复用到。
dailyTip_zh: 邀请和婉拒是真实生活中天天用到的功能，学它们最好的方法是"大声说"。今天请对着手机把 miniDialogue 的两个角色都演一遍，先跟读、再脱稿。特别注意句尾语调：邀请时语调上扬会让你听起来更友好、更自然。婉拒时先说 Sorry，语气放软，再加一句 Maybe next time，既礼貌又地道。开口越多，反应越快！

title_en: People and Places: What Are They Like?
title_zh: 描述人和地方：他们/它是什么样的？
goals: 能用两三个形容词按正确顺序描述一个人的外貌和性格（例如 a tall, friendly man）
能用 who / which / that 把两个短句连成一个句子来描述人或地方
能听懂一段介绍朋友和城市的描述，并抓住关键细节
能开口描述自己的一位家人和一个喜欢的地方，说出至少 4 个形容词

grammarNote.point_en: Adjective order + relative clauses with who / which / that
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 1) 形容词顺序：多个形容词放在名词前时有固定顺序：观点 opinion → 大小 size → 年龄 age → 形状 shape → 颜色 color。例如 a nice big old house（好的、大的、旧的房子），不说 a big nice old house。初学者只要记住『观点词在最前，颜色词在最后，名词紧跟在后面』就够用了。2) 关系代词 who / which / that 用来连接两个句子，避免重复：who 指人，which 指物/地方，that 人和物都可以。例如 The woman who lives next door is kind.（住在隔壁的那个女人很和善。）A city which has many parks is nice.（一个有很多公园的城市很好。）注意 that 里的 th 发浊音 /ð/，舌尖轻触上齿。

examples.en: She is a kind, tall young woman.
examples.zh: 她是一个和善、高挑的年轻女人。（观点→大小→年龄）

examples.en: He lives in a small old brown house.
examples.zh: 他住在一个又小又旧的棕色房子里。（大小→年龄→颜色）

examples.en: That is the man who works at the bank.
examples.zh: 那就是在银行工作的那个男人。（who 指人）

examples.en: I like a city which has clean streets.
examples.zh: 我喜欢街道干净的城市。（which 指物/地方）

examples.en: This is the book that my friend gave me.
examples.zh: 这就是我朋友给我的那本书。（that 人和物都可以）

listening.title: My New Friend and Her City
listening.script: A: Hi, Ben! Who is that woman in the photo? B: Oh, that is Anna. She is my new friend from work. A: What does she look like? B: She is tall, and she has long brown hair and big eyes. She wears glasses. A: She looks friendly. B: Yes! She is very kind and funny. She is the person who helps me at work every day. A: Nice. Where is she from? B: She is from a small old town which has a beautiful river. A: Oh, I love quiet places like that. B: Me too. But now she lives here, in a big modern city. Her street is noisy and crowded, but she likes it. A: Does she like her new home? B: Yes. She has a small clean flat that is near a green park. She says the park is her favorite place. A: She sounds happy. B: She is. You will like her, I think.

targetSounds: 形容词重读：在名词短语里，形容词通常要读得比冠词重，例如 a KIND woman, a BEAUTIFUL city，把重音放在形容词的重读音节上
/ð/ (浊 th)：that / this / the / they / there — 舌尖轻轻放在上齿之间，声带振动，不要读成 /d/ 或 /z/
连读：that is 常连成 that's，who is 连成 who's，让语流更自然

speaking.speakingTask: Describe one person in your family and one place you love. Say what the person looks like (use 2-3 adjectives in order, like 'a tall, kind young woman') and use who/which/that once, for example: 'My father is a quiet, clever old man who works in a small village.' Record yourself speaking for about one minute.

reading.title: The Old Town and the New City
reading.passage:
My grandmother lives in a small old village which is far from the city. It is a quiet, beautiful place. The streets are clean, and the houses are old and brown. My grandmother is a short, kind old woman who has gray hair and a warm smile. She knows every neighbor in the village. Everyone likes her.

I live in a big modern city that is very different. My street is noisy and crowded, and the buildings are tall and new. My best friend, Lily, lives near me. She is a tall young woman who has long black hair and big eyes. She wears glasses and she is very funny and clever.

Both places are nice. The village is quiet and slow. The city is busy and fast. I love the village which is calm, but I also love the city where my friends are. I am happy in both.

comprehension.q: Where does the grandmother live?
comprehension.a: In a small old village which is far from the city.

comprehension.q: What does the grandmother look like?
comprehension.a: She is a short, kind old woman who has gray hair and a warm smile.

comprehension.q: What does Lily look like?
comprehension.a: She is a tall young woman who has long black hair and big eyes, and she wears glasses.

comprehension.q: How is the writer's city street?
comprehension.a: It is noisy and crowded, with tall new buildings.

comprehension.q: Which place does the writer like?
comprehension.a: Both. The writer loves the calm village and also the busy city where the friends are.

writing.prompt: Write a short description (about 60-80 words) of a person you know well and a place you like. Describe what the person looks like and their character, and describe the place. Use at least two adjectives in order (e.g., a tall, kind old man) and use who, which, or that at least twice.
usefulPhrases: I live in a ... city which/that has ...
writing.modelAnswer: My best friend is Mei. She is a short, friendly young woman who has long black hair and big brown eyes. She wears glasses and she is very kind and funny. She is the person who always helps me. Mei lives in a small old town which is near the sea. It is a quiet, beautiful place that has clean streets and green parks. I love it.
selfCheck: 我用了至少两个形容词，并且顺序正确吗（观点/大小→年龄→颜色）？
我用了 who / which / that 至少两次，指人用 who、指物/地方用 which 吗？
描述外貌时我用了 has (hair/eyes) 和 wears (glasses) 吗？
名词前的冠词 a/an 用对了吗（元音前用 an）？
我的句子每个都有主语和动词吗？

reviewFocus: 今天复习并循环使用了以下旧知识：Day 22 的比较级/最高级思路（different, busy, fast, slow 用于对比城市和乡村，可再造句 The city is bigger than the village）；Day 21 的感受形容词（happy, quiet, funny 表达对人和地方的看法，配 because 说原因）；Day 7 的 there is / there are 和房间/家（house, flat, park, street，练习 There are tall buildings in my city）；Day 11 的城镇地点（park, market, bank, hotel，练习 the bank which is near my home）；Day 4 的家庭成员和 has got（grandmother, brother, neighbor + has long hair）。建议：拿出 Day 21 和 Day 22 的单词表，各选 5 个词，用今天的 who/which/that 造 5 个描述人或地方的新句子。
dailyTip_zh: 描述人和地方最好的练习就是『指着就说』。今天在家里或路上，看到一个人或一栋楼，立刻在心里用英语说一句：a tall old building that is near my home。不用完美，重点是把新学的形容词顺序和 who/which/that 变成脱口而出的反应。每天说 10 句，一周后你会发现描述能力明显提升。

title_en: Week 3 Review: Putting It All Together
title_zh: 第三周复习：把所学串起来
goals: 能在一段对话里自然切换现在进行时和一般现在时，谈论此刻和习惯（复习 Day 17）
能用 going to / will 谈未来计划，并用 Would you like to...? / Let's 发出邀请（复习 Day 19、24）
能用比较级、最高级和 who/which/that 描述人和地方（复习 Day 22、25）
能用连读和自然语调，把学过的表达说得更流畅、更像母语者

grammarNote.point_en: Mixed review (Days 17-25): present continuous vs present simple, going to / will, comparatives & superlatives, past continuous, polite requests, and relative clauses (who/which/that)
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 本周语法大复习。要点：1) 现在进行时（be + V-ing）说“此刻正在做”，一般现在时说“习惯/事实”——I usually work here, but today I'm working from home. 2) going to 说已定计划，will 说当场决定或预测。3) 比较级 -er/more...，最高级 the -est/the most...。4) 过去进行时（was/were + V-ing）说过去正在进行的背景，常与一般过去时搭配：when/while。5) 礼貌请求用 Could you...? / Would you like to...? 6) 关系代词 who（人）、which（物）、that（都可）连接两个句子。今天不学新语法，重点是把这些组合起来自然使用。

examples.en: I usually take the bus, but this week I'm driving to work.
examples.zh: 我通常坐公交，但这周我开车上班。（一般现在时 vs 现在进行时）

examples.en: We're going to visit Shanghai next month, and I think it will be fun.
examples.zh: 我们下个月要去上海，我觉得会很好玩。（going to 计划 + will 预测）

examples.en: This café is quieter than the one near my office, and it has the best coffee in town.
examples.zh: 这家咖啡馆比我办公室旁边那家安静，而且有全城最好的咖啡。（比较级 + 最高级）

examples.en: While I was waiting for the bus, I saw a friend who works with me.
examples.zh: 我等公交的时候，看见了一个和我共事的朋友。（过去进行时 + 关系代词 who）

examples.en: Could you send me the address? Would you like to meet at six?
examples.zh: 你能把地址发给我吗？你想六点见面吗？（礼貌请求 + 邀请）

listening.title: A Busy Week (Listening: mixing tenses & plans)
listening.script:
A: Hi Ben! You look busy today.
B: I am! I usually work in the office, but this week I'm working from home. There's a lot of traffic outside.
A: I know. The buses are slower than last month. So, what are you doing this weekend?
B: I'm going to visit my sister in Shanghai. The train is cheaper than the plane, so I'm taking the train.
A: Nice! I'm excited for you. Shanghai has the best food in China, in my opinion.
B: I agree! While I was planning the trip, I found a small hotel near the river. It's quieter than a big hotel.
A: That sounds perfect. Would you like to meet before you go? Maybe we can have coffee on Friday.
B: Good idea. Could you send me the address? I'll probably be free after my meeting.
A: Sure. Let's meet at six. Have a great trip!
B: Thanks! See you Friday.

targetSounds: 连读 (linking)：辅音+元音相连，例如 in_an office → 'i-nan office'；send_me → 'sen-me'
弱读 (weak forms)：to 读成 /tə/，was/were 读成 /wəz/ /wə/，than 读成 /ðən/，如 cheaper than /ˈtʃiːpə ðən/
升降调 (intonation)：一般疑问句用升调 (Would you like to meet↗)，陈述句和特殊疑问句用降调 (What are you doing↘)

shadowing.text: I usually work here, but today I'm working from home.
shadowing.tip: but today 连读成 'bu-today'；working 的 -ing 读 /ŋ/，不要读出 /g/。

shadowing.text: What are you doing this weekend?
shadowing.tip: What are 连读成 'wha-dər'；句末用降调，听起来更自然。

shadowing.text: I'm going to visit my sister in Shanghai.
shadowing.tip: going to 可读成 'gonna'；visit my 里的 t 轻读。

shadowing.text: The train is cheaper than the plane.
shadowing.tip: cheaper than 连读，than 弱读成 /ðən/，重音落在 cheaper。

shadowing.text: Shanghai has the best food, in my opinion.
shadowing.tip: the best 重读 best；in my opinion 语速稍慢，表达看法。

shadowing.text: Would you like to meet on Friday?
shadowing.tip: Would you 连读成 'wʊdʒə'；句末升调表示邀请。

shadowing.text: Could you send me the address?
shadowing.tip: Could you 连读成 'kʊdʒə'；send me → 'sen-me'，礼貌请求用升调。

shadowing.text: I'll probably be free after my meeting.
shadowing.tip: I'll 是 I will 的缩读；probably 常读成两个音节 'prob-ly'。

shadowing.text: While I was waiting, I saw a friend who works with me.
shadowing.tip: was waiting 里 was 弱读 /wəz/；who works 连读。

shadowing.text: That sounds great. Let's meet at six.
shadowing.tip: sounds great 连读；Let's 是 Let us 的缩读，表示建议。

speaking.speakingTask: 录一段 40-60 秒的话：介绍你这个周末的计划。用到现在进行时或 going to（计划）、一个比较级（例如 cheaper/quieter than）、以及一个 who/which/that 从句（例如 a friend who...）。最后邀请一个人：Would you like to...?

reading.title: Anna's Weekend Plan
reading.passage:
Anna works in a small office in the city. She usually takes the bus to work, but this week the traffic is very bad, so she is walking. It is slower, but it is good for her.

This weekend, Anna is going to visit her friend Mia, who lives in a town near the sea. The town is quieter than the city, and Anna thinks it is more beautiful too. She will take the train because it is cheaper than driving.

On Friday, Anna sent Mia a message: "Would you like to have dinner on Saturday? I know a nice restaurant that has great fish." Mia was very happy. "Good idea!" she wrote. "Let's meet at seven."

Anna is excited about the trip. "In my opinion," she says, "a small town is the best place to relax. I probably need a quiet weekend after this busy week."

comprehension.q: Why is Anna walking to work this week?
comprehension.a: Because the traffic is very bad this week.

comprehension.q: Where does Mia live?

writing.prompt: 给一位朋友写一条短消息（40-80 词），邀请他/她这个周末和你一起做点事。说说你的计划（用 going to 或 will）、比较两个地点（用比较级）、并用 who/which/that 描述一个人或地方。最后发出邀请。
usefulPhrases: I know a place that has ...
writing.modelAnswer: Hi Lily! This weekend I'm going to visit a small town near the sea. It is quieter than the city, and I think it will be a great place to relax. I know a nice restaurant that has the best fish in town. Would you like to come with me? The train is cheaper than driving, so let's take the train. Could you tell me if you are free on Saturday? I'm really excited!

我用礼貌的方式发出邀请了吗（Would you like to...? / Let's...）？
句子首字母大写、句末有标点吗？

reviewFocus: 今天集中回顾 Day 17-25：① 现在进行时 vs 一般现在时（Day 17）——用 usually/today 对比；② 交通与介词 by bus/train（Day 18）；③ going to vs will（Day 19）；④ Could you...? 礼貌请求与打电话/约时间（Day 20）；⑤ I think / agree / in my opinion 表达看法与感受（Day 21）；⑥ 比较级与最高级 cheaper/quieter/the best（Day 22）；⑦ 过去进行时 while I was ...ing（Day 23）；⑧ Would you like to...? / Let's 发出邀请（Day 24）；⑨ who/which/that 描述人和地方（Day 25）。把 Day 18 的 traffic、transport、by bus 和 Day 21 的 excited/tired/busy 等旧词，主动放进今天的口语和写作里再用一次。建议用 SRS 卡片把本周标记为“困难”的 8-10 个词再刷一遍。
dailyTip_zh: 复习日的关键不是“再看一遍”，而是“再用一遍”。把本周学过的语法混在一小段真实的话里说出来——比如描述你自己这个周末的计划——大脑记得最牢的，是你亲口造出来的句子，而不是你读过的句子。今天至少大声开口 15 分钟。

title_en: There's a Problem — Let's Fix It
title_zh: 出问题了 — 我们来解决
goals: 能用 "There's a problem with ..." 说明问题所在（房间、订单、账单、网络等）
能用 "I need to ..." 表达自己需要做什么或需要什么帮助
能礼貌地道歉与回应道歉（I'm sorry / No problem），并提出解决办法
能在抱怨时把重音放在关键词上，用下降语调让语气清楚而不失礼貌

grammarNote.point_en: There's a problem with ... / I need to ... / Apologies (I'm sorry, I'm really sorry about that)
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 三个实用句型。1) "There's a problem with + 名词" 用来指出哪里出了问题，problem 后面接 with 加一个名词（the room / my order / the Wi-Fi）。要说不通就用 "It doesn't work."（它坏了/不好用）。2) "I need to + 动词原形" 表示"我需要做某事"（I need to change my room）；"I need + 名词" 表示"我需要某物"（I need a new one）。3) 道歉：说话人道歉用 "I'm sorry" 或更正式的 "I'm really sorry about that."；对方道歉时你可以回 "That's OK / No problem / Don't worry." 抱怨时英语靠重音和下降语调表达认真，而不是靠大声或生气，所以句尾语调要往下走。

examples.zh: 真的很抱歉。我马上处理。

examples.en: That's OK. Thank you for your help.
examples.zh: 没关系。谢谢你的帮助。

listening.title: A Problem at the Hotel（酒店里的一个问题）
listening.script:
A: Good evening. Front desk, how can I help you?
B: Hi. There's a problem with my room. The heater doesn't work, and it's really cold.
A: Oh, I'm really sorry about that. What's your room number?
B: Room 305. And there's another problem. The shower is broken too.
A: I'm so sorry. That's not good. I need to send someone to fix it.
B: Thank you. But it's late, and I'm very tired. I need a warm room now.
A: Of course. I understand. Let me change your room. Room 410 is bigger, and everything works.
B: OK, that sounds better. Is there an extra charge?
A: No, no extra charge. It's free. Again, I apologize for the problem.
B: That's OK. Thank you for your help.
A: Here is your new key. If you need anything, just call the front desk.
B: Great. Thank you very much. Good night.

targetSounds: 抱怨时的重音：把重音放在"问题词"上，如 There's a problem with the WI-FI. / It DOESN'T work. 让对方立刻抓到重点
下降语调 (falling intonation)：陈述问题和道歉时句尾往下走，如 The shower is broken.↓ / I'm really sorry.↓ 显得认真、可信
/r/ 音：really, wrong, refund, room — 舌尖后卷不碰上颚

speaking.speakingTask: 想象你买的东西坏了，你回到商店。请录下 20-30 秒：先说明问题（There's a problem with ...），再说你需要什么（I need to ... / I'd like a refund），最后礼貌道谢。试着在抱怨句尾用下降语调。

reading.title: A Bad Day Online（糟糕的网购一天）
reading.passage:
Last week, I bought a new phone online. I was really happy. But when the box came, there was a big problem. The phone was the wrong color. I wanted black, but this one was pink!

I called the shop. "There's a problem with my order," I said. "You sent me the wrong color. I need to change it." The man was very kind. "I'm really sorry about that," he said. "It's our mistake. We'll replace it for free."

But there was another problem. The screen was broken, and the phone didn't work. So I asked for a refund. "No problem," the man said. "Please send it back with the receipt, and we'll give you your money back."

Two days later, I got my refund. The shop even said sorry again in an email. It was a bad start, but in the end, they solved the problem. Now I always check my order before I am happy!

comprehension.q: What was the first problem with the phone?
comprehension.a: It was the wrong color — the writer wanted black but got pink.

comprehension.q: What was the second problem?
comprehension.a: The screen was broken and the phone didn't work.

comprehension.q: What did the writer ask for in the end?
comprehension.a: A refund (their money back).

comprehension.q: How did the shop respond to the problems?
comprehension.a: The man apologized, offered to replace it for free, then gave a refund and said sorry again in an email — they solved the problem.

writing.prompt: 写一封 40-80 词的简短投诉邮件。想象你在一家酒店住过，房间有问题（例如噪音大、Wi-Fi 坏了、或账单收费错误）。说明问题、说出你需要什么、并礼貌结尾。
usefulPhrases: I need to / I would like ...
Could you please fix / change / refund ...?
writing.modelAnswer:
Dear Manager,

I stayed in Room 208 last night. There's a problem with the room. The Wi-Fi doesn't work, and there was a lot of noise until 2 a.m. I couldn't sleep.

Also, I think there's a mistake on my bill. You charged me twice for breakfast.

I would like a refund for one breakfast. Could you please fix the Wi-Fi too?

Thank you for your help.

Kind regards,
Lin

我的语气礼貌吗（有 please / thank you）？

reviewFocus: 复习并循环使用前几天的内容：Day 20 的礼貌请求 "Can I ...? / Could you ...?"（今天用在 Can you fix it? / Could you please refund ...）；Day 15 的建议句 should/shouldn't（想想商家 should replace it）；Day 12-13 的过去式 (bought/came/said/didn't work) 在阅读故事里反复出现；Day 6 的 "I would like ..." 用于要求退款；Day 7 的 there is/there are 升级为 "There's a problem with ..."。把今天的新词 problem, broken, fix, wrong, refund 各造一个句子，并复述酒店对话。
dailyTip_zh: 抱怨时，礼貌 + 清楚 = 有效。不用生气或大声，只要把重音放在关键词、句尾语调往下走，别人就会认真对待你。先说问题、再说需求、最后道谢，这个"三步法"几乎适用于所有场合。今天大声跟读酒店对话至少三遍，模仿说话人真诚的语气——这就是地道英语的感觉。

title_en: Have You Ever...? Talking About Experiences
title_zh: 你曾经……吗？谈论人生经历
goals: 能用 have/has + 过去分词 说出自己做过或从未做过的事（I have visited... / I have never eaten...）
能提出并回答 have you ever...? 的经历类问题，自然使用 ever 和 never
能听懂并说出 have/has 的弱读形式，把 /v/ 音和后面的词自然连读
能就一个熟悉话题（旅行、食物、活动）进行 6 到 8 句的经历对话

grammarNote.point_en: Present perfect: have/has + past participle; ever / never
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 现在完成时用来谈论人生经历（不说具体时间）。结构是 主语 + have/has + 过去分词。I/you/we/they 用 have，he/she/it 用 has。been 表示'去过（又回来了）'，gone 表示'去了（还没回来）'。常见不规则过去分词：be→been, do→done, go→gone, eat→eaten, see→seen, meet→met, try→tried。提问经历常用 Have you ever...? （你曾经……吗？）ever 表示'在任何时候'，只用在疑问句里；回答否定用 never（从未），never 本身就是否定，句子里不再加 not：I have never been to Japan.

listening.title: Have You Ever Been Abroad?
listening.script:
A: Hi, Ben. You look happy today. What's new?
B: Hi, Mia. I have just booked a trip! I'm going to Japan next month.
A: Wow, that's amazing! Have you ever been to Japan before?
B: No, I haven't. I have never been there. But I have always wanted to go.
A: I have been there twice. It's a wonderful country.
B: Really? Have you ever tried real Japanese food?
A: Yes, I have. I have tried sushi many times. It's delicious.
B: I have never eaten sushi. I'm a little scared, but I want to try it.
A: Don't worry. You'll love it. Have you ever traveled abroad before?
B: Yes, I have visited two countries. I have been to Thailand and Korea.
A: Nice! Have you ever climbed a mountain there?
B: No, never. But this time I want to climb one. It will be a real adventure.
A: That sounds great. You'll have an amazing time.
B: Thanks, Mia. I can't wait!

reading.title: My Sister's Big Adventure
reading.passage:
My sister, Lily, loves to travel. She has visited many countries and has had a lot of amazing experiences. Last year she went abroad for six months.

Lily has been to five countries in Asia. She has tried many kinds of food. She has tasted noodles in China and hot soup in Thailand. She says she has never had bad food on her trips!

Her favorite experience was in Japan. She has climbed a high mountain there. It was hard and a little scary, but the view at the top was wonderful. She has done it twice now.

Lily has met many kind people. She has even met a famous singer once! But she has never lost anything on a trip, not even her phone.

Now she is home again. "I have had a wonderful adventure," she says. "But I have not seen everything yet. I want to travel more!"

glossary.meaning_zh: 品尝了（taste 的过去分词/过去式）

comprehension.q: How many countries has Lily been to in Asia?
comprehension.a: She has been to five countries.

comprehension.q: What food has she tasted in Thailand?
comprehension.a: She has tasted hot soup.

comprehension.q: What was her favorite experience?
comprehension.a: Climbing a high mountain in Japan.

comprehension.q: Has Lily ever lost her phone on a trip?
comprehension.a: No, she has never lost anything, not even her phone.

comprehension.q: Does Lily want to stop traveling now?
comprehension.a: No, she wants to travel more because she has not seen everything yet.

writing.prompt: Write about your experiences. Tell me three things you have done in your life and two things you have never done (but want to do). Use the present perfect (I have... / I have never...).
usefulPhrases: One of my best experiences was...
I have done it twice / once.
writing.modelAnswer: I have had many good experiences in my life. I have visited three cities in my country, and I have tried a lot of different food. I have also met a famous person once! It was amazing. But there are things I have never done. I have never traveled abroad, and I have never climbed a high mountain. I have always wanted to see the ocean. One day, I hope I can do these things. Life is a big adventure!

我写了三件做过的事和两件从未做过的事吗？

reviewFocus: 复习第27天的抱怨与解决用语（There's a problem with... / I need to）和第24天的邀请句型（Would you like to...? / Let's），在今天的经历对话里自然带出，例如 "Would you like to travel with me?"。同时复习第12-13天的过去式（went, saw, had, tried），对比它们和今天现在完成时的区别：过去式说'具体什么时候做的'（Last year she went abroad），现在完成时说'人生经历、没说具体时间'（She has been to five countries）。再快速回顾第2天的国家/职业词汇和第18天的交通方式（by train, by boat），把它们用进 "I have traveled by..." 的句子里。
dailyTip_zh: 现在完成时对中文母语者是难点，因为中文没有对应的时态。别急着背规则，试试'经历清单'练习法：拿一张纸，左边写5件你做过的事（I have...），右边写5件你从没做过的事（I have never...）。每天大声读一遍，边读边想画面。三四天后，这些句子就会变成你的本能反应，而不是靠翻译。记住：现在完成时不关心'什么时候'，只关心'做没做过'。

title_zh: 让对话继续下去：连接词与自然停顿
goals: 能用 and / but / so / because / also 把短句连成更长、更自然的句子
能在说话时使用自然的填充词（well, you know, let me think）争取思考时间，不冷场
能听懂并按意群（thought groups）在正确的地方停顿，让说话更清楚
能进行一段 8-10 轮来回的真实对话，主动接话并追问

grammarNote.point_en: Linking words (and / but / so / because / also) and fillers
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 连接词把两个想法连成一句，让语言更连贯：and 表示补充（还有）；but 表示转折（但是）；so 表示结果（所以）；because 表示原因（因为）；also 表示附加（也、还）。填充词（fillers）如 well, um, you know, let me think, actually 不是错误——母语者常用它们来争取思考时间、让对话不冷场。说长句时要按意群停顿（thought groups），例如 'I went home, / and then / I made dinner, / because I was hungry.' 每个斜线处轻轻停一下，气息更顺，听者更容易懂。

我很开心，因为今天是星期五。

listening.title: Two Friends Talk About the Weekend
listening.script:
A: Hey, how was your weekend?
B: Well, it was busy, but it was fun. On Saturday I went to the market, and then I cooked a big dinner.
A: Really? What did you make?
B: Um, I made noodles, because my sister loves them. And I also made some soup.
A: That sounds great. I'm not a good cook, so I usually just eat out.
B: Oh, me too, actually. But sometimes I like to try new things.
A: That's a good point. So, what about Sunday?
B: Sunday was quiet. I stayed home because it was raining. I read a book, and I watched a movie.
A: Nice. I agree, a quiet day is nice sometimes.
B: Anyway, how about you? Did you do anything fun?
A: Well, let me think... I went to the park with my dog, and we walked for two hours. It was tiring, but I felt good after.
B: That's great. We should go together next time.

targetSounds: Thought groups（意群）：把长句切成小块，每块表达一个想法，块与块之间轻轻停顿。例如 'I went home, / and I made dinner, / because I was hungry.'
Natural pausing（自然停顿）：在连接词 and/but/so/because 前后可以稍作停顿，给自己思考时间，也让听者跟得上。
填充词的轻读：well, um, you know 说得轻、快、低，不要重读，它们只是'占位'的声音。
连读：'kind of' → 'kinda'，'going to' → 'gonna'，'and then' 常读成 'an' then'，让语流更顺。

speaking.speakingTask: Record yourself talking about your last weekend for 60-90 seconds. Use at least four connectors (and, but, so, because, also) and one filler (well, actually, or you know) to sound natural. Try to pause at thought groups.

reading.title: How to Keep a Conversation Going
reading.passage:
A good conversation is like a game of catch. One person talks, and then the other person talks. You throw the ball, and your friend throws it back. But how can you keep it going?

First, use small words to connect your ideas. Say "and" to add more, "but" to show a difference, and "so" to show a result. These words make your sentences longer and more natural.

Second, ask questions. When your friend says something, you can say "Really?" or "Why?" This shows you are listening, and it helps your friend continue.

Also, it is okay to use small sounds like "well" or "um." Native speakers use them too, because they need time to think. Do not worry about being perfect.

So, the next time you talk to someone, relax, listen well, and use these easy words. Your conversations will be longer and more fun.

glossary.meaning_zh: 接球游戏（这里比喻你来我往的对话）

comprehension.a: and, but, and so.

comprehension.q: Why is it okay to use sounds like 'well' or 'um'?
comprehension.a: Because native speakers use them too; they need time to think.

comprehension.q: What three things should you do next time you talk to someone?
comprehension.a: Relax, listen well, and use these easy connecting words.

Have you ever been there?' 复习 Day 21（I think / because / 感受形容词）和 Day 27（There's a problem with... / 道歉），因为它们都需要连接词把观点和原因连起来。再快速回顾 Day 13/23 的过去时（went, saw, had, was doing），因为今天谈周末会大量用到过去时。重点：把 and/but/so/because 用到之前学过的句子里，把短句连成长句。
dailyTip_zh: 别怕停顿和'嗯'。流利不等于说得快，而是能一直把对话接下去。今天练习时，故意用 well / let me think 给自己争取思考时间——母语者每天都这么做。把说话想象成'接球游戏'：多问一句 'Really? Why?' 就能让对话继续，压力也从你身上转到对方。

theme: CAPSTONE: self-intro + tell a story + big review
title_en: You Can Do It: Your English Story
title_zh: 毕业日：自我介绍 + 讲一个故事 + 全课程大复习
goals: 能流利地做一个 40-60 秒的自我介绍（姓名、国家、工作、爱好、家庭）
能用过去时和过去进行时讲一个 5-8 句的小故事
能用 I think / because / but / so 表达并解释自己的看法
能自然地综合运用全部 30 天学过的时态与功能进行一段较长的对话

grammarNote.point_en: Putting it all together: mixing tenses and functions naturally
grammarNote.explanation_zh: 今天不学新语法，而是把 30 天学过的全部内容整合起来。一段真实的英语通常会混用多种时态：介绍现在的自己用一般现在时（I live / I work），讲昨天发生的事用一般过去时（I went / I saw），描述当时正在做的事用过去进行时（I was walking），谈未来计划用 be going to / will，谈人生经历用现在完成时（I have visited）。记住这个'时间地图'：现在=现在时，过去=过去时/过去进行时，未来=going to/will，经历=have + 过去分词。用 and / but / so / because 把句子连起来，就能说出自然流畅的长段落。

examples.en: Hi, I'm Lin. I live in Beijing and I work as a nurse.

examples.en: I have never been to America, but I'm going to go next year.
examples.zh: 我从没去过美国，但我明年打算去。（现在完成时 + 将来：连接经历与计划）

examples.zh: 我觉得英语很有用，所以我每天学它。（表达看法 + so 连接）

listening.title: A Student Tells Her English Story
listening.script:
Hello, everyone. My name is Mei, and I want to tell you my story. Thirty days ago, I could only say "hello" and "my name is Mei." English was very difficult for me, and I made many mistakes. But I didn't give up.

Every day, I studied for two hours. In the morning, I listened to short talks. In the afternoon, I practiced speaking with myself. One evening, while I was reading a story, I understood every word. I was so happy! That was a big moment for me.

Now I feel more confident. I have learned many new words, and I can talk about my family, my job, and my plans. I have never spoken English on the phone before, but next week I'm going to try.

This was a long journey, but I'm proud of myself. I will continue to practice, because my dream is to travel and make friends around the world. Thank you for listening.

comprehension.a: Because her dream is to travel and make friends around the world.

targetSounds: 整体节奏：把句子按'意群'（thought groups）来说，在 and / but / so / because 前后自然停顿一下，不要一字一顿。
句子重音：把重要的实词（名词、动词、形容词）说重、说长，把 the / a / to / of 等虚词说轻说快。
升降调复习：陈述句和 wh- 问句用降调（↓），yes/no 问句用升调（↑）。
连读复习：辅音+元音要连起来，如 an_example, made_a, proud_of。

shadowing.text: Hi, let me introduce myself.
shadowing.tip: introduce 重音在第三个音节 -duce；myself 重音在 -self。降调结尾。

shadowing.text: My name is Mei, and I'm from China.
shadowing.tip: and I'm from 连读快读；name、Mei、China 说重。逗号处轻停一下。

shadowing.text: I work as a nurse, and I love my job.
shadowing.tip: work_as_a 连读；两个小句用 and 连起来，中间不要停太久。

shadowing.text: Thirty days ago, English was very difficult.
shadowing.tip: was 弱读成 /wəz/；difficult 重音在第一个音节 DIF-。

shadowing.text: But I didn't give up, so I kept going.
shadowing.tip: but 和 so 前面各轻停一下；didn't 说成一个音 /dɪdnt/。

shadowing.text: While I was walking, it started to rain.
shadowing.tip: was 弱读；while 的意群说完停一下再说主句。这是讲故事的节奏。

shadowing.text: I have learned a lot, and I feel proud.
shadowing.tip: have 弱读成 /həv/；learned_a 连读；proud 降调重读。

shadowing.text: I think English is really useful.
shadowing.tip: think 后面轻轻带过；really 和 useful 重读，表达强调。

shadowing.text: Next year, I'm going to travel abroad.
shadowing.tip: going to 可自然读成 gonna；travel_abroad 连读。谈计划的降调。

shadowing.text: Thank you, everyone. I hope you enjoyed my story.
shadowing.tip: everyone 重音在 EV-；hope、enjoyed、story 说重。温暖的降调收尾。

speaking.speakingTask: 录一段 40-60 秒的自我介绍：说出你的名字、来自哪里、你的工作、一个爱好，然后用过去时讲一件这 30 天里发生的小事（比如某天你听懂了一整段英语），最后用 going to 说一个未来目标。试着用 and / but / so / because 把句子连起来。

reading.title: My Thirty-Day Journey
reading.passage:
My name is Tom. I live in a small town, and I work in a shop. Thirty days ago, I started to learn English. I want to share my journey with you.

The first week was difficult. I could not remember many words, and I made a lot of mistakes. Sometimes I felt tired. But I practiced every day, so slowly I improved.

One day, I was watching a short video. Suddenly, I understood the whole story! I was very happy and proud of myself.

Now I know enough words to talk about my family, my day, and my plans. I have learned so much since June. English is important to me because it opens a big door.

In the future, I hope to travel and speak with people from many countries. This is not the end. I will continue, and I will make my dream come true. Thank you for learning with me!

glossary.meaning_zh: 打开一扇大门（比喻带来很多机会）

comprehension.a: Suddenly he understood the whole story, and he felt happy and proud.

comprehension.q: What does Tom hope to do in the future?
comprehension.a: He hopes to travel and speak with people from many countries.

writing.prompt: 写一篇 60-90 词的短文《我的英语故事》(My English Story)。用一般现在时介绍现在的你（名字、工作或身份、一个爱好），用过去时讲一件这 30 天里的小事，用现在完成时说你已经学会了什么，最后用 going to / will 写一个未来目标。用 and / but / so / because 把句子连起来。

In the future, I'm going to ...
writing.modelAnswer: My name is Anna, and I work in an office. I love music. Thirty days ago, I could say only a few words, and English was difficult. One evening, I was listening to a talk, and I understood everything. I felt so happy! I have learned many new words since June, so now I feel confident. English is important to me because it opens new doors. In the future, I'm going to travel to England, and I will continue to practice every day.

reviewFocus: 今天是全课程大复习，请系统性回顾以下内容：(1) 时态地图——一般现在时（Day 5 日常作息）、一般过去时（Day 12-13 规则/不规则动词 went/saw/had）、过去进行时（Day 23 was/were + -ing 讲故事）、将来（Day 19 going to / will）、现在完成时（Day 28 have/has + 过去分词, ever/never/since）。(2) 功能复习——自我介绍（Day 2 姓名/国家/工作）、家庭（Day 4）、爱好（Day 9 like + -ing）、表达看法（Day 21 I think / because）、比较（Day 22）、连接词与填充词（Day 29 and/but/so/because）。(3) 高频词回收——把 Day 1-29 里最常用的动词（go, have, work, live, like, want, learn）和形容词（happy, difficult, important, proud）在今天的自我介绍和故事里再说一遍。建议用手机把自己的自我介绍录下来，和 Day 2 第一次录音对比，感受 30 天的进步。
dailyTip_zh: 恭喜你走到第 30 天！进步不是因为你从不犯错，而是因为你每天都开口、都坚持。把今天录的自我介绍存好，一个月后再听一次，你会为自己骄傲。学习一门语言不是一次冲刺，而是一段长跑——今天不是结束，而是你能真正"用"英语的开始。给自己一个奖励，然后明天继续说下去。You can do it!
